domains.name: Organizational Controls
domains.description: Controls related to the overall organizational governance and management of information security.
domains.description_el: Έλεγχοι που σχετίζονται με τη συνολική οργανωτική διακυβέρνηση και διαχείριση της ασφάλειας πληροφοριών.

controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.purpose: To define and approve management direction for information security.
controls.description: Management shall define, approve and publish an information security policy document that establishes the organization's approach to managing information security.
controls.detailed_description: The information security policy is a foundational document that communicates management's commitment to information security. It should align with business objectives, legal and regulatory requirements, and contractual obligations. The policy must be reviewed at planned intervals or when significant changes occur to ensure its continuing suitability, adequacy and effectiveness. It should be communicated throughout the organization and made available to all relevant internal and external parties.
controls.guidance: Develop the policy through consultation with relevant stakeholders. Ensure it is approved by top management. Use a document control system to manage versions and reviews. Consider integrating the policy with other management system policies. Communicate the policy during induction and through regular awareness campaigns. Review at least annually or after major incidents.
controls.purpose_el: Καθορισμός και έγκριση της κατεύθυνσης της διοίκησης για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών.
controls.description_el: Η διοίκηση πρέπει να καθορίζει, εγκρίνει και δημοσιεύει ένα έγγραφο πολιτικής ασφάλειας πληροφοριών που καθιερώνει την προσέγγιση του οργανισμού για τη διαχείριση της ασφάλειας πληροφοριών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η πολιτική ασφάλειας πληροφοριών είναι ένα θεμελιώδες έγγραφο που επικοινωνεί τη δέσμευση της διοίκησης για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών. Πρέπει να ευθυγραμμίζεται με τους επιχειρηματικούς στόχους, τις νομικές και κανονιστικές απαιτήσεις και τις συμβατικές υποχρεώσεις. Η πολιτική πρέπει να αναθεωρείται σε προγραμματισμένα διαστήματα ή όταν συμβαίνουν σημαντικές αλλαγές.
controls.guidance_el: Αναπτύξτε την πολιτική μέσω διαβούλευσης με ενδιαφερόμενους φορείς. Βεβαιωθείτε ότι εγκρίνεται από την ανώτατη διοίκηση. Χρησιμοποιήστε σύστημα διαχείρισης εγγράφων για έλεγχο εκδόσεων και αναθεωρήσεων.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.purpose: To assign information security roles and responsibilities.
controls.description: Information security roles and responsibilities shall be defined and assigned according to the organization's needs.
controls.detailed_description: Clear assignment of information security roles and responsibilities ensures accountability across the organization. This includes defining the information security manager, asset owners, system administrators, and other security-related roles. Each role should have documented responsibilities, authority levels, and reporting lines. The RACI matrix approach is recommended to clarify who is responsible, accountable, consulted and informed for each security process.
controls.guidance: Document all security roles in a RACI matrix. Review roles annually or when organizational changes occur. Ensure role definitions include backup arrangements. Include security responsibilities in job descriptions. Conduct induction briefings on security roles for new starters.
controls.purpose_el: Ανάθεση ρόλων και ευθυνών ασφάλειας πληροφοριών.
controls.description_el: Οι ρόλοι και οι ευθύνες ασφάλειας πληροφοριών πρέπει να καθορίζονται και να ανατίθενται σύμφωνα με τις ανάγκες του οργανισμού.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η σαφής ανάθεση ρόλων και ευθυνών ασφάλειας πληροφοριών διασφαλίζει την υπευθυνότητα σε όλο τον οργανισμό. Αυτό περιλαμβάνει τον καθορισμό του υπεύθυνου ασφάλειας πληροφοριών, των ιδιοκτητών περιουσιακών στοιχείων, των διαχειριστών συστημάτων και άλλων σχετικών ρόλων ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Τεκμηριώστε όλους τους ρόλους ασφάλειας σε έναν πίνακα RACI. Αναθεωρήστε τους ρόλους ετησίως ή όταν συμβαίνουν οργανωτικές αλλαγές.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.purpose: To reduce the risk of fraud, error and circumvention of security controls.
controls.description: Conflicting duties and areas of responsibility shall be segregated to reduce opportunities for unauthorized or unintentional modification or misuse of the organization's assets.
controls.detailed_description: Segregation of duties is a fundamental internal control principle that prevents any single individual from having control over all phases of a critical process. This reduces the risk of fraud, error, and circumvention of security controls. Examples include separating the roles of system development and production access, or separating authorization from execution of financial transactions. Compensating controls should be implemented where full segregation is not operationally feasible.
controls.guidance: Identify critical processes where segregation is required. Map current duties against segregation requirements. Implement compensating controls (e.g., dual approval, audit trails) where segregation is impractical. Regularly audit compliance with segregation policies.
controls.purpose_el: Μείωση του κινδύνου απάτης, σφάλματος και καταστρατήγησης των ελέγχων ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Αντικρουόμενα καθήκοντα και τομείς ευθύνης πρέπει να διαχωρίζονται για να μειωθούν οι ευκαιρίες για μη εξουσιοδοτημένη ή ακούσια τροποποίηση ή κακή χρήση των περιουσιακών στοιχείων του οργανισμού.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο διαχωρισμός καθηκόντων είναι μια θεμελιώδης αρχή εσωτερικού ελέγχου που αποτρέπει οποιοδήποτε μεμονωμένο άτομο από το να έχει έλεγχο σε όλες τις φάσεις μιας κρίσιμης διαδικασίας.
controls.guidance_el: Προσδιορίστε κρίσιμες διαδικασίες όπου απαιτείται διαχωρισμός. Χαρτογραφήστε τα τρέχοντα καθήκοντα έναντι των απαιτήσεων διαχωρισμού.

controls.title: Management responsibilities
controls.purpose: To ensure management is aware of and fulfills its information security responsibilities.
controls.description: Management shall require all employees and contractors to apply information security in accordance with the established policies and procedures.
controls.detailed_description: Management responsibilities for information security extend beyond policy approval to active oversight and enforcement. Managers at all levels must ensure their teams understand and comply with security requirements. This includes ensuring security is considered in performance reviews, project planning, and resource allocation. Management must also respond to security incidents and ensure corrective actions are implemented.
controls.guidance: Include security compliance as a performance objective for managers. Provide management with security dashboards and reports. Conduct regular management reviews of security posture. Ensure managers have authority to enforce security requirements.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ότι η διοίκηση γνωρίζει και εκπληρώνει τις ευθύνες της για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών.
controls.description_el: Η διοίκηση πρέπει να απαιτεί από όλους τους εργαζομένους και τους συνεργάτες να εφαρμόζουν την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών σύμφωνα με τις καθιερωμένες πολιτικές και διαδικασίες.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι ευθύνες της διοίκησης για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών εκτείνονται πέρα από την έγκριση πολιτικής σε ενεργή εποπτεία και επιβολή.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε τη συμμόρφωση ασφάλειας ως στόχο απόδοσης για τους διαχειριστές.

controls.title: Contact with authorities
controls.purpose: To ensure appropriate communication with relevant authorities.
controls.description: The organization shall establish and maintain contact with relevant authorities regarding information security.
controls.detailed_description: Maintaining contact with relevant authorities such as law enforcement, regulatory bodies, and national cybersecurity agencies is essential for incident response and regulatory compliance. The organization should know when and how to report security incidents, data breaches, and other security events. Pre-established contacts enable faster response during incidents. This also includes monitoring regulatory changes that may affect the organization's security obligations.
controls.guidance: Maintain a contact list of relevant authorities including law enforcement, data protection authorities, and sector-specific regulators. Define escalation procedures for different types of incidents. Test communication channels regularly. Stay informed about regulatory changes.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση κατάλληλης επικοινωνίας με τις αρμόδιες αρχές.
controls.description_el: Ο οργανισμός πρέπει να καθιερώνει και να διατηρεί επαφή με αρμόδιες αρχές σχετικά με την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διατήρηση κατάλληλων επαφών με αρχές διασφαλίζει ότι ο οργανισμός μπορεί να αναφέρει περιστατικά, να λαμβάνει ενημερώσεις για απειλές και να συμμορφώνεται με κανονιστικές απαιτήσεις.
controls.guidance_el: Τεκμηριώστε τις επαφές με αρχές και διαδικασίες επικοινωνίας. Αναθεωρείτε ετησίως.

controls.title: Contact with special interest groups
controls.purpose: To maintain appropriate contacts with special interest groups.
controls.description: The organization shall establish and maintain contact with special interest groups and professional forums related to information security.
controls.detailed_description: Participation in information security special interest groups, such as industry ISACs (Information Sharing and Analysis Centers), professional bodies (e.g., ISACA, ISC2), and sector-specific forums provides access to threat intelligence, best practices, and emerging trends. These contacts enable the organization to benefit from collective industry knowledge and improve its security posture. Care should be taken to limit information sharing to what is appropriate and authorized.
controls.guidance: Identify relevant industry groups and forums. Establish membership and participation arrangements. Define what information can be shared externally. Encourage staff participation in professional security communities.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση κατάλληλης επικοινωνίας με ειδικές ομάδες ενδιαφέροντος.
controls.description_el: Ο οργανισμός πρέπει να καθιερώνει και να διατηρεί επαφή με ειδικές ομάδες ενδιαφέροντος ή άλλους οργανισμούς ασφάλειας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η συμμετοχή σε ομάδες ενδιαφέροντος παρέχει πρόσβαση σε πληροφορίες απειλών, βέλτιστες πρακτικές και έγκαιρες προειδοποιήσεις.
controls.guidance_el: Συμμετέχετε σε relevant ομάδες ανταλλαγής πληροφοριών ασφάλειας (ISACs).

controls.title: Threat intelligence
controls.purpose: To ensure threat intelligence is collected, analyzed and used to inform security decisions.
controls.description: The organization shall collect and analyze threat intelligence to inform and guide its information security decisions.
controls.detailed_description: Threat intelligence involves collecting, processing, and analyzing information about current and emerging threats to the organization. This includes tracking threat actor tactics, techniques and procedures (TTPs), vulnerability disclosures, and indicators of compromise (IoCs). Threat intelligence should be integrated into risk management, security monitoring, and incident response processes. A structured approach using frameworks such as MITRE ATT&CK can enhance intelligence analysis.
controls.guidance: Subscribe to threat intelligence feeds relevant to your industry. Establish a process for analyzing and disseminating intelligence. Integrate intelligence into security operations and risk assessments. Review intelligence sources regularly for relevance and quality.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ύπαρξης και προσβασιμότητας πληροφοριών επαφής για αναφορά περιστατικών ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Πρέπει να υπάρχουν και να είναι προσβάσιμες πληροφορίες επαφής για αναφορά περιστατικών ασφάλειας πληροφοριών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι κατάλληλες πληροφορίες επαφής διασφαλίζουν ότι τα περιστατικά μπορούν να αναφερθούν γρήγορα στα αρμόδια άτομα ή ομάδες.
controls.guidance_el: Δημοσιεύστε πληροφορίες επαφής σε εμφανή σημεία. Ελέγχετε τακτικά ότι είναι ενημερωμένες.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.purpose: To integrate information security into project management.
controls.description: Information security shall be integrated into project management throughout the project lifecycle.
controls.detailed_description: Projects introduce new or changed information processing systems, assets, and processes. Security requirements must be considered from project initiation through planning, execution, monitoring, and closure. This includes conducting security assessments for new projects, ensuring secure design principles are applied, and verifying security requirements are met before go-live. Project managers should have access to security expertise and tools to assess and address project-specific risks.
controls.guidance: Include security checkpoints in project stage-gate processes. Provide project managers with security assessment templates. Ensure security representatives are assigned to major projects. Review security outcomes in project closure reports.
controls.purpose_el: Ενσωμάτωση της ασφάλειας πληροφοριών στη διαχείριση έργων.
controls.description_el: Η ασφάλεια πληροφοριών πρέπει να ενσωματώνεται στη διαχείριση έργων καθ' όλη τη διάρκεια του κύκλου ζωής του έργου.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ενσωμάτωση της ασφάλειας πληροφοριών στη διαχείριση έργων διασφαλίζει ότι οι κίνδυνοι ασφάλειας αντιμετωπίζονται από την έναρξη έως την ολοκλήρωση του έργου.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας στη φάση σχεδιασμού έργων.

controls.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.purpose: To identify and maintain an inventory of information assets.
controls.description: The organization shall identify and maintain an inventory of information and other associated assets.
controls.detailed_description: An accurate and up-to-date asset inventory is the foundation of effective information security management. The inventory should cover all information assets (data, databases, files) and associated assets (hardware, software, services, personnel, facilities). Each asset should be identified with a unique identifier, classified, and assigned an owner. The inventory should be maintained through regular reviews and automated discovery tools where possible.
controls.guidance: Use automated discovery tools to identify assets. Establish a process for asset registration during procurement and decommissioning. Assign asset owners and ensure they understand their responsibilities. Conduct regular inventory reconciliation. Include cloud and virtual assets in scope.
controls.purpose_el: Δημιουργία και διατήρηση μητρώου πληροφοριακών πόρων.
controls.description_el: Πρέπει να δημιουργηθεί και να διατηρείται μητρώο πληροφοριακών πόρων.
controls.detailed_description_el: Το μητρώο πληροφοριακών πόρων παρέχει μια κεντρική καταγραφή όλων των περιουσιακών στοιχείων πληροφοριών, συμπεριλαμβανομένων των ιδιοκτητών, της ταξινόμησης και της θέσης τους.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε τακτικές απογραφές περιουσιακών στοιχείων. Χρησιμοποιήστε αυτοματοποιημένα εργαλεία για ανίχνευση.

controls.title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.purpose: To define acceptable use rules for information assets.
controls.description: Rules for the acceptable use of information and other associated assets shall be identified, documented and implemented.
controls.detailed_description: Acceptable use rules define how employees and contractors may use organizational information assets, including computers, networks, email, internet access, software, and data. These rules should cover personal use, data handling, password management, mobile device usage, and social media guidelines. The rules must balance security requirements with operational needs. Clear communication and consistent enforcement are essential.
controls.guidance: Develop an Acceptable Use Policy covering all asset types. Communicate the policy during induction and annually. Use technical controls (web filtering, DLP) to enforce rules. Monitor compliance and take disciplinary action for violations. Review and update the policy regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση αποδεκτής χρήσης των πληροφοριακών πόρων σύμφωνα με τις πολιτικές ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η αποδεκτή χρήση των πληροφοριακών πόρων πρέπει να τεκμηριώνεται και να κοινοποιείται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι κανόνες αποδεκτής χρήσης καθορίζουν τι επιτρέπεται και τι απαγορεύεται κατά τη χρήση των πόρων ΤΠ του οργανισμού.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε κανόνες για προσωπική χρήση, λήψεις και αποθήκευση δεδομένων.

controls.title: Return of assets
controls.purpose: To ensure assets are returned upon termination of employment or contract.
controls.description: The organization shall establish processes to ensure the return of organizational assets upon termination of employment, contract or agreement.
controls.detailed_description: When employees leave the organization or contractors complete their engagements, all organizational assets in their possession must be returned. This includes physical assets (laptops, phones, access cards, documents) and digital assets (data, credentials). The process should be integrated with the offboarding workflow and include verification that all assets are accounted for. Failure to recover assets can lead to data breaches and loss of intellectual property.
controls.guidance: Maintain a checklist of assets to recover during offboarding. Coordinate between HR, IT, and facility management. Verify asset return before final settlement. Ensure remote wiping capability for mobile devices. Document and investigate missing assets.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση επιστροφής των περιουσιακών στοιχείων του οργανισμού από τους εργαζομένους κατά τη λήξη της απασχόλησης.
controls.description_el: Οι εργαζόμενοι πρέπει να επιστρέφουν τα περιουσιακά στοιχεία του οργανισμού κατά τη λήξη της απασχόλησης.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαδικασία επιστροφής περιουσιακών στοιχείων διασφαλίζει ότι όλος ο εξοπλισμός και τα δεδομένα επιστρέφονται όταν ένας εργαζόμενος αποχωρεί.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε λίστα ελέγχου αποχώρησης που καλύπτει κλειδιά, κάρτες, φορητούς υπολογιστές και δεδομένα.

controls.title: Classification of information
controls.purpose: To ensure information is classified according to its sensitivity.
controls.description: Information shall be classified according to its sensitivity, criticality and legal requirements.
controls.detailed_description: Information classification ensures that data receives an appropriate level of protection based on its value, sensitivity, and regulatory requirements. A classification scheme should define clear categories (e.g., Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted) with corresponding handling requirements. Classification decisions should be made by information owners and applied consistently. Labels should be applied in accordance with the classification standard.
controls.guidance: Develop a classification policy with clear criteria for each level. Train staff on classification requirements. Implement automated classification tools where possible. Include classification in data creation workflows. Review classifications periodically.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση κατάλληλης ταξινόμησης των πληροφοριών βάσει των απαιτήσεων ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Οι πληροφορίες πρέπει να ταξινομούνται σύμφωνα με τις απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ταξινόμηση πληροφοριών επιτρέπει την κατάλληλη προστασία με βάση την ευαισθησία και την κρισιμότητά τους.
controls.guidance_el: Καθορίστε επίπεδα ταξινόμησης (π.χ. απόρρητο, εμπιστευτικό, εσωτερικό, δημόσιο).

controls.title: Labelling of information
controls.purpose: To ensure information assets are properly labelled.
controls.description: An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling shall be developed and implemented.
controls.detailed_description: Information labelling ensures that the classification of information is clearly and consistently indicated. Labels can be applied in various forms including document headers/footers, metadata tags, watermarks, and system labels. Labelling procedures should cover both digital and physical information assets. Automated labelling tools can reduce the burden on users and improve consistency.
controls.guidance: Define labelling requirements for each classification level. Use automated labelling tools (e.g., Microsoft Information Protection). Include labelling in document templates. Provide user guidance on manual labelling. Verify labelling compliance through audits.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση κατάλληλης επισήμανσης των πληροφοριών για διευκόλυνση της επεξεργασίας τους.
controls.description_el: Οι πληροφορίες πρέπει να επισημαίνονται κατάλληλα για διευκόλυνση της επεξεργασίας τους.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η επισήμανση πληροφοριών βοηθά τους χρήστες να αναγνωρίζουν το επίπεδο ευαισθησίας και τις απαιτήσεις χειρισμού.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε αυτόματη επισήμανση όπου είναι δυνατόν.

controls.title: Information transfer
controls.purpose: To maintain security when transferring information.
controls.description: Rules, procedures, or agreements shall be in place for the secure transfer of information.
controls.detailed_description: Information transfer security covers all methods of transmitting information both internally and externally. This includes email, file transfer, APIs, physical media, and messaging applications. Transfer controls should ensure confidentiality, integrity, and availability during transmission. Agreements with external parties should specify security requirements and responsibilities.
controls.guidance: Implement secure file transfer protocols (SFTP, HTTPS). Encrypt sensitive data in transit. Use data loss prevention (DLP) solutions for email. Establish secure messaging policies. Include security clauses in data transfer agreements.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφάλειας κατά τη μεταφορά πληροφοριών εντός και εκτός του οργανισμού.
controls.description_el: Η ασφάλεια των πληροφοριών πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται κατά τη μεταφορά τους εντός και εκτός του οργανισμού.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφαλής μεταφορά πληροφοριών περιλαμβάνει κρυπτογράφηση, ασφαλή κανάλια και επαλήθευση παραληπτών.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε κρυπτογράφηση για ευαίσθητες πληροφορίες που αποστέλλονται ηλεκτρονικά.

controls.title: Access control
controls.purpose: To control access to information and other associated assets.
controls.description: Access to information and other associated assets shall be controlled based on business and security requirements.
controls.detailed_description: Access control ensures that only authorized individuals can access information and systems. This covers the entire access lifecycle: provisioning, authentication, authorization, and de-provisioning. Access should be granted based on the principle of least privilege and need-to-know. Controls should be applied consistently across all systems and networks. Regular access reviews are essential to maintain appropriate access.
controls.guidance: Implement role-based access control (RBAC). Establish access request and approval processes. Conduct quarterly access reviews. Remove access promptly upon role change or termination. Use privileged access management (PAM) for administrative accounts.
controls.purpose_el: Καθιέρωση κανόνων και δικαιωμάτων ελέγχου πρόσβασης για την προστασία των πληροφοριακών πόρων.
controls.description_el: Πρέπει να καθιερωθούν κανόνες και δικαιώματα ελέγχου πρόσβασης για την προστασία των πληροφοριακών πόρων.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο έλεγχος πρόσβασης διασφαλίζει ότι μόνο εξουσιοδοτημένοι χρήστες έχουν πρόσβαση σε συστήματα και δεδομένα.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε αρχή ελάχιστων προνομίων και ανάγκης γνώσης.

controls.title: Identity management
controls.purpose: To manage the identities of users throughout their lifecycle.
controls.description: The organization shall manage the identities of users throughout their lifecycle.
controls.detailed_description: Identity management covers the creation, maintenance, and deactivation of user identities across all systems. This includes establishing a unique identifier for each user, linking identity attributes from authoritative sources (e.g., HR system), and ensuring timely de-provisioning when users leave. A centralized identity management system (such as Active Directory, LDAP, or IDaaS) should be used to manage identities consistently.
controls.guidance: Use an identity provider (IdP) for centralized management. Automate identity lifecycle with HR system integration. Implement just-in-time (JIT) access for temporary users. Conduct regular identity audits. Use strong authentication for identity management operations.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση διαχείρισης των ταυτοτήτων των χρηστών καθ' όλη τη διάρκεια του κύκλου ζωής τους.
controls.description_el: Οι ταυτότητες των χρηστών πρέπει να διαχειρίζονται καθ' όλη τη διάρκεια του κύκλου ζωής τους.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαχείριση ταυτοτήτων περιλαμβάνει δημιουργία, ενεργοποίηση, απενεργοποίηση και διαγραφή λογαριασμών χρηστών.
controls.guidance_el: Αυτοματοποιήστε τη δημιουργία και απενεργοποίηση λογαριασμών.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.purpose: To ensure secure management of authentication information.
controls.description: Authentication information shall be securely managed throughout its lifecycle.
controls.detailed_description: Authentication information includes passwords, PINs, cryptographic keys, biometric data, and tokens. Secure management covers generation, distribution, storage, use, change, and destruction of authentication information. Password policies should require complexity, length, and rotation. Multi-factor authentication should be implemented for sensitive systems. Authentication information must be stored using strong cryptographic hashing.
controls.guidance: Enforce strong password policies (min 12 chars, complexity). Implement MFA for all remote access and privileged accounts. Use password managers for service accounts. Never store passwords in plaintext. Implement self-service password reset (SSPR).
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφαλούς πιστοποίησης ταυτότητας των χρηστών για πρόσβαση σε συστήματα και δεδομένα.
controls.description_el: Η πιστοποίηση ταυτότητας των χρηστών πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται για πρόσβαση σε συστήματα και δεδομένα.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ισχυροί μηχανισμοί πιστοποίησης ταυτότητας αποτρέπουν μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε πολυπαραγοντική πιστοποίηση για ευαίσθητα συστήματα.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.purpose: To ensure access rights are reviewed and managed.
controls.description: Access rights shall be reviewed, reconciled and managed regularly.
controls.detailed_description: Regular review of access rights ensures that access remains appropriate as users change roles, projects, or employment status. Reviews should cover all systems and applications, including privileged access. The review process should involve both system owners and data owners. Findings from access reviews should be tracked and remediated within defined timeframes. Automated access certification tools can streamline the review process.
controls.guidance: Schedule quarterly access reviews for critical systems. Use automated access certification tools. Document review outcomes and remediation actions. Implement segregation of duties in review processes. Report access review metrics to management.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση κατάλληλης παροχής, αναθεώρησης και ανάκλησης δικαιωμάτων πρόσβασης.
controls.description_el: Τα δικαιώματα πρόσβασης πρέπει να παρέχονται, αναθεωρούνται και ανακαλούνται κατάλληλα.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαχείριση δικαιωμάτων πρόσβασης διασφαλίζει ότι οι χρήστες έχουν μόνο τα απαραίτητα δικαιώματα για την εργασία τους.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε τακτικές αναθεωρήσεις δικαιωμάτων πρόσβασης.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships
controls.purpose: To protect information assets accessible by suppliers.
controls.description: The organization shall establish processes to manage and protect information shared with suppliers.
controls.detailed_description: Supplier relationships introduce information security risks that must be managed throughout the supplier lifecycle. This includes assessing supplier security capabilities before engagement, defining security requirements in contracts, monitoring supplier performance, and ensuring secure termination. The approach should be proportionate to the risk posed by the supplier, with higher-risk suppliers subject to more rigorous controls.
controls.guidance: Classify suppliers by risk level. Conduct security assessments for high-risk suppliers. Include security clauses in supplier contracts. Monitor supplier security through reporting and audits. Establish termination procedures for information return or destruction.
controls.title_el: Ασφάλεια πληροφοριών στις σχέσεις με προμηθευτές
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση προστασίας των πληροφοριών του οργανισμού που είναι προσβάσιμες από προμηθευτές.
controls.description_el: Οι πληροφορίες του οργανισμού που είναι προσβάσιμες από προμηθευτές πρέπει να προστατεύονται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι σχέσεις με προμηθευτές μπορεί να εκθέσουν τον οργανισμό σε πρόσθετους κινδύνους ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Ταξινομήστε τους προμηθευτές βάσει κινδύνου και εφαρμόστε ανάλογους ελέγχους.

controls.title: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
controls.purpose: To define security requirements in supplier agreements.
controls.description: The organization shall define, document and agree information security requirements in supplier agreements.
controls.detailed_description: Supplier agreements must clearly specify information security requirements to protect the organization's information assets. These requirements should cover confidentiality, integrity, availability, incident management, data protection, and compliance with applicable laws. Agreements should specify service level targets, reporting obligations, audit rights, and remedies for security failures. Requirements should be proportionate to the sensitivity of information involved.
controls.guidance: Develop supplier security requirement templates. Include right-to-audit clauses. Define security SLAs with measurable targets. Specify data handling and breach notification requirements. Review and update agreements regularly.
controls.title_el: Αντιμετώπιση της ασφάλειας πληροφοριών στις συμφωνίες με προμηθευτές
controls.purpose_el: Ενσωμάτωση απαιτήσεων ασφάλειας πληροφοριών σε συμφωνίες με προμηθευτές.
controls.description_el: Απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας πληροφοριών πρέπει να ενσωματώνονται σε συμφωνίες με προμηθευτές.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι συμφωνίες με προμηθευτές πρέπει να περιλαμβάνουν ρήτρες εμπιστευτικότητας, ακεραιότητας και διαθεσιμότητας.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε πρότυπα συμφωνιών με τυποποιημένες ρήτρες ασφάλειας.

controls.title: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
controls.purpose: To manage risks in the ICT supply chain.
controls.description: The organization shall manage information security risks associated with the ICT supply chain.
controls.detailed_description: ICT supply chain security addresses risks from third-party products and services integrated into the organization's systems. This includes hardware, software, cloud services, and managed services. Supply chain risks include compromised components, counterfeit products, and vulnerabilities in third-party code. A supply chain risk management program should assess suppliers, verify product integrity, and monitor supply chain threats.
controls.guidance: Map your ICT supply chain and identify critical dependencies. Assess supplier security practices. Implement software supply chain security measures (e.g., SBOM). Monitor supply chain threat intelligence. Plan for supply chain disruptions.
controls.title_el: Διαχείριση ασφάλειας πληροφοριών στην αλυσίδα εφοδιασμού ΤΠΕ
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία των πληροφοριών που διαχειρίζονται προμηθευτές στην αλυσίδα εφοδιασμού ΤΠΕ.
controls.description_el: Οι πληροφορίες που διαχειρίζονται προμηθευτές στην αλυσίδα εφοδιασμού ΤΠΕ πρέπει να προστατεύονται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφάλεια της αλυσίδας εφοδιασμού αντιμετωπίζει κινδύνους που σχετίζονται με προϊόντα και υπηρεσίες ΤΠΕ.
controls.guidance_el: Αξιολογήστε την ασφάλεια κρίσιμων προμηθευτών στην αλυσίδα εφοδιασμού.

controls.title: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
controls.purpose: To monitor and review supplier services regularly.
controls.description: The organization shall monitor, review and manage changes to supplier services.
controls.detailed_description: Supplier services change over time through updates, new versions, and changes in business arrangements. These changes can introduce new risks that must be managed. Monitoring should cover service levels, security incidents, and compliance with contractual requirements. Changes to supplier services should trigger a risk reassessment. Effective supplier management requires regular communication and relationship management.
controls.guidance: Establish supplier management review cadence. Monitor supplier security metrics and SLAs. Require suppliers to notify changes in advance. Conduct periodic supplier security assessments. Maintain escalation procedures for supplier issues.
controls.title_el: Παρακολούθηση, αναθεώρηση και διαχείριση αλλαγών υπηρεσιών προμηθευτών
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση συνεχούς συμμόρφωσης των προμηθευτών με τις απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η συνεχής συμμόρφωση των προμηθευτών με τις απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η παρακολούθηση και αναθεώρηση υπηρεσιών προμηθευτών διασφαλίζει ότι πληρούνται οι συμφωνημένες απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε τακτικές αξιολογήσεις και ελέγχους προμηθευτών.

controls.title: Information security for use of cloud services
controls.purpose: To ensure security when using cloud services.
controls.description: The organization shall establish and maintain security measures for the use of cloud services.
controls.detailed_description: Cloud services present unique security considerations including shared responsibility models, data residency, multi-tenancy, and dependency on cloud provider security. The organization must understand its responsibilities under the shared responsibility model and implement appropriate controls. Cloud security assessment should cover data protection, access management, encryption, incident response, and compliance with regulatory requirements.
controls.guidance: Use a Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) tool. Implement cloud access security broker (CASB) controls. Encrypt data at rest and in transit in cloud. Assess cloud provider against standards (ISO 27001, SOC 2). Define cloud governance policies.
controls.title_el: Ασφάλεια πληροφοριών για χρήση υπηρεσιών νέφους
controls.purpose_el: Καθορισμός κανόνων για την ασφαλή χρήση υπηρεσιών νέφους.
controls.description_el: Πρέπει να καθορίζονται κανόνες για την ασφαλή χρήση υπηρεσιών νέφους.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η χρήση υπηρεσιών νέφους εισάγει πρόσθετους κινδύνους που πρέπει να αντιμετωπιστούν με κατάλληλους ελέγχους.
controls.guidance_el: Αξιολογήστε παρόχους νέφους πριν από τη χρήση. Καθορίστε πολιτική για υπηρεσίες νέφους.

controls.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.purpose: To plan and prepare for information security incidents.
controls.description: The organization shall plan and prepare for information security incidents by defining processes and allocating resources.
controls.detailed_description: Information security incident management requires advance planning to ensure effective response. This includes developing incident response plans, establishing an incident response team, defining communication protocols, and ensuring necessary tools and resources are available. Plans should cover detection, analysis, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review. Regular testing of incident response capabilities is essential.
controls.guidance: Establish a Computer Security Incident Response Team (CSIRT). Develop incident response playbooks for common scenarios. Conduct tabletop exercises and simulations. Ensure 24/7 contact and escalation capabilities. Maintain relationships with external incident response resources.
controls.title_el: Σχεδιασμός και προετοιμασία διαχείρισης περιστατικών ασφάλειας πληροφοριών
controls.purpose_el: Προετοιμασία για αποτελεσματική αντιμετώπιση περιστατικών ασφάλειας πληροφοριών.
controls.description_el: Ο οργανισμός πρέπει να προετοιμάζεται για αποτελεσματική αντιμετώπιση περιστατικών ασφάλειας πληροφοριών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο σχεδιασμός διαχείρισης περιστατικών περιλαμβάνει δημιουργία ομάδας αντιμετώπισης, διαδικασιών και εργαλείων.
controls.guidance_el: Καθιερώστε ομάδα αντιμετώπισης περιστατικών (CSIRT/CERT).

controls.title: Assessment and decision on information security events
controls.purpose: To assess information security events and decide if they are incidents.
controls.description: The organization shall assess information security events and decide whether they should be classified as incidents.
controls.detailed_description: Not every security event becomes an incident. A structured assessment process is needed to evaluate events based on severity, impact, and likelihood. This includes initial triage, evidence collection, and escalation criteria. The assessment should consider the potential impact on confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information. Clear criteria for incident classification help ensure consistent decision-making.
controls.guidance: Define incident classification criteria (e.g., severity levels). Establish a triage process with defined SLAs. Train staff on event reporting and triage. Use a ticketing system for event tracking. Document assessment decisions for audit purposes.
controls.title_el: Αξιολόγηση και απόφαση για περιστατικά ασφάλειας πληροφοριών
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση αξιολόγησης και λήψης απόφασης για περιστατικά ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Τα περιστατικά ασφάλειας πληροφοριών πρέπει να αξιολογούνται και να λαμβάνονται αποφάσεις για αυτά.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η αξιολόγηση περιστατικών καθορίζει τη σοβαρότητα, την επίδραση και την απαραίτητη αντιμετώπιση.
controls.guidance_el: Καθορίστε κριτήρια αξιολόγησης και ιεράρχησης περιστατικών.

controls.title: Response to information security incidents
controls.purpose: To respond to information security incidents effectively.
controls.description: The organization shall respond to information security incidents in accordance with the incident response plan.
controls.detailed_description: Effective incident response follows a structured process to contain, eradicate, and recover from security incidents while minimizing impact. The response should be coordinated by the incident response team and follow established playbooks. All actions should be documented for post-incident review and potential legal proceedings. Communication to stakeholders, regulators, and affected parties should follow predefined protocols.
controls.guidance: Follow NIST 800-61 incident response framework. Document all actions during response. Preserve evidence for forensic analysis. Communicate with stakeholders per plan. Activate escalation procedures when needed.
controls.purpose_el: Αποτελεσματική αντιμετώπιση περιστατικών ασφάλειας σύμφωνα με καθιερωμένες διαδικασίες.
controls.description_el: Τα περιστατικά ασφάλειας πληροφοριών πρέπει να αντιμετωπίζονται αποτελεσματικά σύμφωνα με καθιερωμένες διαδικασίες.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η αντιμετώπιση περιστατικών περιλαμβάνει συγκράτηση, εξάλειψη και ανάκαμψη.
controls.guidance_el: Τεκμηριώστε διαδικασίες αντιμετώπισης για διάφορους τύπους περιστατικών.

controls.title: Learning from information security incidents
controls.purpose: To learn from incidents and improve security posture.
controls.description: Knowledge gained from information security incidents shall be used to improve the security posture.
controls.detailed_description: Post-incident reviews (lessons learned) are critical for continuous improvement. Each significant incident should be analyzed to identify root causes, systemic weaknesses, and improvement opportunities. Findings should be documented in a post-incident report with actionable recommendations. Improvements may include process changes, additional controls, training, or configuration changes. Lessons should be shared with relevant teams across the organization.
controls.guidance: Conduct post-incident reviews within 2 weeks of resolution. Document root cause analysis using structured methodologies. Track improvement actions to closure. Share anonymized lessons learned across the organization. Update incident response plans based on findings.
controls.purpose_el: Αξιοποίηση της γνώσης από περιστατικά για βελτίωση των μέτρων ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η γνώση από περιστατικά ασφάλειας πρέπει να χρησιμοποιείται για βελτίωση των μέτρων ασφάλειας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η μάθηση από περιστατικά περιλαμβάνει ανάλυση ριζικών αιτιών και εφαρμογή διορθωτικών ενεργειών.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε ανασκοπήσεις μετά από περιστατικά και τεκμηριώστε διδάγματα.

controls.title: Collection of evidence
controls.purpose: To ensure proper collection of evidence for investigations.
controls.description: The organization shall establish procedures for the identification, collection, acquisition and preservation of evidence related to information security events.
controls.detailed_description: Digital evidence must be handled carefully to maintain its integrity and admissibility in legal or disciplinary proceedings. Procedures should follow forensic best practices, including maintaining chain of custody, using write-blockers, and creating forensic images rather than working on original media. Evidence collection should be performed by trained personnel. The order of volatility should be considered when collecting evidence.
controls.guidance: Train staff on basic evidence handling procedures. Maintain forensic toolkits. Document chain of custody for all evidence. Use write-blockers when collecting storage media. Follow jurisdictional requirements for evidence handling.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση κατάλληλης συλλογής και διαχείρισης αποδεικτικών στοιχείων.
controls.description_el: Τα αποδεικτικά στοιχεία πρέπει να συλλέγονται και να διαχειρίζονται κατάλληλα.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η συλλογή αποδεικτικών στοιχείων πρέπει να ακολουθεί νομικές απαιτήσεις και να διατηρεί την αλυσίδα φύλαξης.
controls.guidance_el: Καθορίστε διαδικασίες για συλλογή, διαχείριση και αποθήκευση αποδεικτικών στοιχείων.

controls.title: Information security during disruption
controls.purpose: To maintain information security during disruptive events.
controls.description: The organization shall plan and prepare to maintain information security at an appropriate level during disruption.
controls.detailed_description: Disruptions such as natural disasters, cyber attacks, or infrastructure failures can impact information security. Business continuity and disaster recovery plans must include information security considerations. This includes ensuring security controls remain operational during alternate processing modes, maintaining security during relocation, and restoring security controls to normal levels after recovery. Security requirements should be integrated into the business continuity management system.
controls.guidance: Integrate security into business continuity plans. Test security controls during BCP exercises. Ensure alternate sites maintain security standards. Plan for degraded mode operations security. Review security implications of continuity strategies.
controls.title_el: Ασφάλεια πληροφοριών κατά τη διακοπή ή αλλαγή της απασχόλησης
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία των πληροφοριών του οργανισμού κατά τη λήξη ή αλλαγή της απασχόλησης.
controls.description_el: Οι πληροφορίες του οργανισμού πρέπει να προστατεύονται κατά τη λήξη ή αλλαγή της απασχόλησης.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαδικασία αποχώρησης προσωπικού πρέπει να περιλαμβάνει μέτρα προστασίας πληροφοριών.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε ελέγχους ασφάλειας στη διαδικασία αποχώρησης προσωπικού.

controls.title: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.purpose: To ensure ICT readiness for business continuity.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure ICT readiness for business continuity through appropriate technical controls and planning.
controls.detailed_description: ICT readiness for business continuity ensures that technology systems can support business continuity requirements. This includes system redundancy, backup and restore capabilities, disaster recovery sites, and capacity management for failover scenarios. ICT continuity plans should be tested regularly to ensure they work when needed. The level of readiness should be based on business impact analysis results and recovery time objectives (RTOs) and recovery point objectives (RPOs).
controls.guidance: Define RTOs and RPOs for critical systems. Implement redundant infrastructure for high-availability systems. Test disaster recovery plans at least annually. Document and test failover procedures. Review ICT continuity capacity against growth.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση της συνέχειας των υπηρεσιών ΤΠ σε περιπτώσεις διαταραχής.
controls.description_el: Η συνέχεια των υπηρεσιών ΤΠ πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται σε περιπτώσεις διαταραχής.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η προετοιμασία ΤΠ για επιχειρησιακή συνέχεια περιλαμβάνει σχέδια, αντίγραφα ασφαλείας και πλεονασμό.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε τακτικές δοκιμές σχεδίων επιχειρησιακής συνέχειας.

controls.title: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
controls.purpose: To identify and comply with relevant legal requirements.
controls.description: The organization shall identify, document and comply with legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements related to information security.
controls.detailed_description: Organizations operate in a complex legal environment with multiple obligations relating to information security. These may include data protection laws (GDPR, CCPA), sector-specific regulations (HIPAA, PCI DSS, SOX), intellectual property laws, and contractual agreements. A structured approach to legal compliance includes identifying applicable requirements, assessing compliance, implementing controls, and monitoring changes. Legal counsel should be involved in interpreting requirements.
controls.guidance: Maintain a legal register of applicable requirements. Review legal changes quarterly. Assess compliance through internal audits. Engage legal counsel for interpretation. Document compliance decisions and rationale.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση συμμόρφωσης με νομικές, κανονιστικές και συμβατικές απαιτήσεις.
controls.description_el: Ο οργανισμός πρέπει να συμμορφώνεται με νομικές, κανονιστικές και συμβατικές απαιτήσεις.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο εντοπισμός και η συμμόρφωση με νομικές απαιτήσεις είναι κρίσιμη για την αποφυγή κυρώσεων.
controls.guidance_el: Διατηρείτε μητρώο νομικών και κανονιστικών απαιτήσεων.

controls.title: Intellectual property rights
controls.purpose: To protect intellectual property rights.
controls.description: The organization shall implement procedures to protect intellectual property rights.
controls.detailed_description: Intellectual property (IP) includes patents, copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets, and proprietary information. The organization must ensure it respects third-party IP rights and protects its own IP. This includes managing software licenses, controlling access to proprietary information, and ensuring proper use of copyrighted materials. IP protection should be addressed in employment agreements, supplier contracts, and data handling policies.
controls.guidance: Implement software license management. Use digital rights management (DRM) for sensitive IP. Include IP protection in employment agreements. Conduct IP compliance audits. Establish processes for IP disclosure and protection.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία των δικαιωμάτων πνευματικής ιδιοκτησίας σύμφωνα με την ισχύουσα νομοθεσία.
controls.description_el: Τα δικαιώματα πνευματικής ιδιοκτησίας πρέπει να προστατεύονται σύμφωνα με την ισχύουσα νομοθεσία.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο οργανισμός πρέπει να σέβεται τα δικαιώματα πνευματικής ιδιοκτησίας τρίτων και να προστατεύει τα δικά του.
controls.guidance_el: Καθιερώστε πολιτική για χρήση λογισμικού και περιεχομένου.

controls.title: Protection of records
controls.purpose: To protect records from loss, destruction and falsification.
controls.description: The organization shall protect records against loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorized access and unauthorized release.
controls.detailed_description: Records (documents, data, evidence) are essential for business operations, legal compliance, and governance. Records management covers the entire lifecycle from creation through storage, retrieval, archiving, and disposal. Controls should ensure records are authentic, reliable, complete, and usable. Records retention schedules should align with legal and regulatory requirements. Both physical and electronic records require appropriate protection.
controls.guidance: Implement a records management policy. Define retention schedules for all record types. Use secure storage for physical records. Implement audit trails for record access and changes. Ensure disposal processes are secure.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία των αρχείων από απώλεια, καταστροφή, παραποίηση και μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.description_el: Τα αρχεία πρέπει να προστατεύονται από απώλεια, καταστροφή, παραποίηση και μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η προστασία αρχείων διασφαλίζει τη διαθεσιμότητα και ακεραιότητα σημαντικών επιχειρηματικών εγγράφων.
controls.guidance_el: Καθορίστε πολιτική διατήρησης αρχείων σύμφωνα με νομικές απαιτήσεις.

controls.title: Privacy and protection of personally identifiable information
controls.purpose: To ensure privacy and protection of PII.
controls.description: The organization shall identify and meet the requirements for privacy and protection of personally identifiable information (PII).
controls.detailed_description: Privacy and PII protection requirements arise from regulations such as GDPR, CCPA, and other data protection laws. The organization must identify what PII it processes, establish lawful bases for processing, implement data subject rights, and apply appropriate technical and organizational measures. A privacy program should include privacy impact assessments, data protection policies, and breach notification procedures.
controls.guidance: Appoint a Data Protection Officer (DPO) if required. Conduct privacy impact assessments for high-risk processing. Implement data subject rights procedures. Maintain records of processing activities (ROPA). Provide privacy training to staff.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση προστασίας προσωπικών δεδομένων σύμφωνα με το ισχύον νομικό πλαίσιο.
controls.description_el: Η προστασία προσωπικών δεδομένων πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται σύμφωνα με το ισχύον νομικό πλαίσιο.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο οργανισμός πρέπει να συμμορφώνεται με κανονισμούς προστασίας δεδομένων όπως ο GDPR.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε εκτίμηση αντικτύπου προστασίας δεδομένων (DPIA) όπου απαιτείται.

controls.title: Independent review of information security
controls.purpose: To ensure independent review of information security management.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure independent review of its approach to managing information security at planned intervals.
controls.detailed_description: Independent review provides objective assurance that the information security management system (ISMS) is operating effectively. Reviews can be conducted by internal audit, external auditors, or other independent parties. The review should assess conformity with ISO 27001 requirements, implementation effectiveness, and alignment with business objectives. Findings should be reported to management with recommendations for improvement.
controls.guidance: Schedule internal audits at least annually. Use qualified independent auditors. Define audit scope based on risk. Report findings to top management. Track corrective actions to closure.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ανεξάρτητης αναθεώρησης της προσέγγισης του οργανισμού για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών.
controls.description_el: Η προσέγγιση του οργανισμού για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών πρέπει να αναθεωρείται ανεξάρτητα.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι ανεξάρτητες αναθεωρήσεις παρέχουν αντικειμενική αξιολόγηση της αποτελεσματικότητας του ΣΔΑΠ.
controls.guidance_el: Προγραμματίστε τακτικούς εσωτερικούς ελέγχους από ανεξάρτητους ελεγκτές.

controls.title: Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security
controls.purpose: To ensure compliance with organizational security policies.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security.
controls.detailed_description: Compliance with internal policies and standards is as important as external regulatory compliance. The organization must establish processes to monitor, measure, and report on compliance with its own security requirements. This includes regular compliance audits, automated monitoring where possible, and defined consequences for non-compliance. Management should receive regular compliance reports.
controls.guidance: Use automated compliance monitoring tools. Conduct periodic compliance audits. Define consequences for non-compliance. Report compliance metrics to management. Update policies based on compliance findings.
controls.title_el: Συμμόρφωση με πολιτικές, κανόνες και πρότυπα ασφάλειας πληροφοριών
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση συμμόρφωσης με καθιερωμένες πολιτικές και πρότυπα ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η συμμόρφωση με καθιερωμένες πολιτικές και πρότυπα ασφάλειας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο οργανισμός πρέπει να διαθέτει μηχανισμούς για παρακολούθηση συμμόρφωσης και αντιμετώπιση αποκλίσεων.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε αυτοματοποιημένα εργαλεία για έλεγχο συμμόρφωσης.

controls.title: Documented operating procedures
controls.purpose: To ensure operating procedures are documented and available.
controls.description: The organization shall document and make available operating procedures for information processing facilities.
controls.detailed_description: Documented operating procedures ensure that information processing facilities are operated correctly and consistently. Procedures should cover routine operations, startup and shutdown, backup, maintenance, and emergency operations. Procedures should be clear, accessible to operators, and kept up to date. Well-documented procedures reduce operational errors and support training of new operators.
controls.guidance: Document procedures for all critical systems. Use a standard format for procedure documents. Review and update procedures annually. Make procedures available at point of use. Include procedures in operator training.
controls.purpose_el: Τεκμηρίωση και διατήρηση των τυποποιημένων επιχειρησιακών διαδικασιών για λειτουργίες ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Οι τυποποιημένες επιχειρησιακές διαδικασίες για λειτουργίες ασφάλειας πρέπει να τεκμηριώνονται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι τυποποιημένες διαδικασίες διασφαλίζουν συνέπεια και ποιότητα στις λειτουργίες ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Τεκμηριώστε και διατηρείτε ενημερωμένες τις επιχειρησιακές διαδικασίες.

domains.name: People Controls
domains.description: Controls related to the behavior and management of personnel in relation to information security.
domains.description_el: Έλεγχοι που σχετίζονται με τη συμπεριφορά και διαχείριση του προσωπικού σε σχέση με την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών.

controls.title: Screening
controls.purpose: To ensure candidates are screened prior to employment.
controls.description: The organization shall conduct screening checks of all candidates prior to employment.
controls.detailed_description: Pre-employment screening helps ensure that personnel are suitable for their roles and can be trusted with organizational assets. Screening should be proportionate to the sensitivity of the role and may include identity verification, criminal record checks, employment history verification, and reference checks. Screening requirements should be applied consistently and comply with applicable privacy laws.
controls.guidance: Define screening requirements by role sensitivity. Obtain candidate consent before screening. Use consistent screening processes. Document screening results. Re-screen periodically for sensitive roles.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ότι οι υποψήφιοι κατανοούν τις ευθύνες τους και είναι κατάλληλοι για τους ρόλους τους.
controls.description_el: Οι υποψήφιοι πρέπει να κατανοούν τις ευθύνες τους και να ελέγχονται για καταλληλότητα.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο έλεγχος υποψηφίων περιλαμβάνει επαλήθευση ταυτότητας, προσόντων και ελέγχους ιστορικού.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε ελέγχους ιστορικού ανάλογα με την ευαισθησία του ρόλου.

controls.title: Terms and conditions of employment
controls.purpose: To define information security responsibilities in employment terms.
controls.description: The organization shall define and document information security responsibilities in employment terms and conditions.
controls.detailed_description: Employment contracts and terms of reference should clearly communicate information security responsibilities to all employees and contractors. This includes obligations to protect organizational assets, comply with security policies, report security incidents, and maintain confidentiality. Specific responsibilities for security roles should be documented in job descriptions. Contract clauses should survive termination of employment.
controls.guidance: Include security responsibilities in all employment contracts. Define role-specific security duties in job descriptions. Ensure contractors sign security agreements. Include post-employment confidentiality obligations. Review terms regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ότι οι εργαζόμενοι γνωρίζουν και αποδέχονται τις ευθύνες τους για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών.
controls.description_el: Οι εργαζόμενοι πρέπει να γνωρίζουν και να αποδέχονται τις ευθύνες τους για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι όροι απασχόλησης πρέπει να περιλαμβάνουν ρήτρες εμπιστευτικότητας και αποδοχής πολιτικών ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε ευθύνες ασφάλειας σε συμβάσεις εργασίας.

controls.title: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.purpose: To ensure personnel are aware of and trained on information security.
controls.description: The organization shall provide information security awareness, education and training to personnel.
controls.detailed_description: A comprehensive security awareness program ensures that personnel understand their security responsibilities and have the knowledge to fulfill them. The program should include initial induction training, annual refresher training, specialized training for security roles, and ongoing awareness communications (newsletters, posters, phishing simulations). Training effectiveness should be measured and the program adjusted based on results.
controls.guidance: Develop a security awareness program calendar. Use phishing simulations to test awareness. Track training completion rates. Tailor training to different roles. Measure behavior change through metrics.
controls.title_el: Ευαισθητοποίηση, εκπαίδευση και κατάρτιση για την ασφάλεια πληροφοριών
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση κατάλληλης ευαισθητοποίησης και εκπαίδευσης των εργαζομένων σε θέματα ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η κατάλληλη ευαισθητοποίηση και εκπαίδευση των εργαζομένων σε θέματα ασφάλειας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Το πρόγραμμα ευαισθητοποίησης πρέπει να καλύπτει πολιτικές, διαδικασίες και απειλές ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε τακτικές εκπαιδεύσεις και αξιολογήστε την αποτελεσματικότητά τους.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.purpose: To handle information security violations through disciplinary process.
controls.description: The organization shall establish a disciplinary process for handling information security violations.
controls.detailed_description: A clear disciplinary process demonstrates that information security violations have consequences and supports consistent enforcement. The process should define what constitutes a violation, how violations are reported and investigated, and what disciplinary measures may be applied (from verbal warnings to termination). Due process should be followed, and actions should be proportionate to the severity and intent of the violation.
controls.guidance: Document the disciplinary process in the security policy. Ensure due process and right of appeal. Communicate consequences of violations. Document all disciplinary actions. Apply process consistently across the organization.
controls.purpose_el: Καθιέρωση επίσημης διαδικασίας πειθαρχικής ευθύνης για παραβιάσεις ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Πρέπει να καθιερωθεί επίσημη διαδικασία πειθαρχικής ευθύνης για παραβιάσεις ασφάλειας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η πειθαρχική διαδικασία πρέπει να είναι δίκαιη, τεκμηριωμένη και αναλογική.
controls.guidance_el: Κοινοποιήστε τη διαδικασία πειθαρχικής ευθύνης σε όλους τους εργαζομένους.

controls.title: Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
controls.purpose: To ensure security responsibilities continue after employment changes.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure information security responsibilities continue after termination or change of employment.
controls.detailed_description: Responsibilities for protecting information assets extend beyond the period of employment. Employees and contractors must return all organizational assets upon departure and continue to respect confidentiality obligations. The organization should conduct exit interviews to remind departing personnel of their ongoing obligations. Access rights should be revoked promptly upon termination or role change.
controls.guidance: Include post-employment obligations in contracts. Conduct exit interviews with security reminders. Revoke access promptly on termination. Remind personnel of confidentiality obligations. Document asset return verification.
controls.title_el: Ευθύνες μετά τη λήξη ή αλλαγή απασχόλησης
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ολοκλήρωσης των ευθυνών ασφάλειας μετά τη λήξη ή αλλαγή απασχόλησης.
controls.description_el: Οι ευθύνες ασφάλειας πρέπει να ολοκληρώνονται μετά τη λήξη ή αλλαγή απασχόλησης.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαδικασία αποχώρησης πρέπει να περιλαμβάνει επιστροφή περιουσιακών στοιχείων και ανάκληση προσβάσεων.
controls.guidance_el: Αυτοματοποιήστε την ανάκληση προσβάσεων κατά την αποχώρηση.

controls.title: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements
controls.purpose: To protect information through confidentiality agreements.
controls.description: The organization shall require employees and contractors to sign confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements.
controls.detailed_description: Confidentiality and non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) legally bind personnel to protect confidential information. NDAs should specify what information is considered confidential, the duration of obligations, and permitted uses. Different agreements may be needed for employees, contractors, and third parties. NDAs should be signed before access to confidential information is granted.
controls.guidance: Use standardized NDA templates reviewed by legal. Require NDAs before granting access to confidential data. Specify duration and scope of confidentiality. Ensure NDAs are enforceable in relevant jurisdictions. Maintain NDA register.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία πληροφοριών μέσω συμφωνιών εμπιστευτικότητας.
controls.description_el: Οι πληροφορίες πρέπει να προστατεύονται μέσω συμφωνιών εμπιστευτικότητας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι συμφωνίες μη αποκάλυψης (NDA) προστατεύουν ευαίσθητες πληροφορίες που κοινοποιούνται σε τρίτους.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε NDA για συνεργάτες, προμηθευτές και εργαζομένους.

controls.title: Remote working
controls.purpose: To ensure security of information accessed remotely.
controls.description: The organization shall implement security measures to protect information accessed, processed or stored remotely.
controls.detailed_description: Remote working introduces additional security risks including unsecured networks, device theft, and reduced oversight. Organizations must implement technical controls such as VPNs, multi-factor authentication, endpoint protection, and secure remote desktop solutions. Policy controls should define acceptable remote working practices, device requirements, and data handling procedures. The remote working policy should be reviewed regularly as technology and threats evolve.
controls.guidance: Implement VPN with MFA for remote access. Use managed devices with endpoint protection. Enforce disk encryption on remote devices. Provide remote working security guidelines. Test remote access controls regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφάλειας πληροφοριών κατά την τηλεργασία.
controls.description_el: Η ασφάλεια πληροφοριών πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται κατά την τηλεργασία.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η πολιτική τηλεργασίας πρέπει να καλύπτει ασφάλεια συσκευών, πρόσβαση και προστασία δεδομένων.
controls.guidance_el: Παρέχετε εταιρικές συσκευές με ελέγχους ασφάλειας για τηλεργασία.

controls.title: Information security event reporting
controls.purpose: To enable timely reporting of security events.
controls.description: The organization shall establish a mechanism for personnel to report information security events in a timely manner.
controls.detailed_description: Timely reporting of security events is critical for effective incident response. Personnel must know what constitutes a security event and how to report it. Reporting channels should be accessible, simple, and available 24/7. Anonymity or confidentiality options should be provided for sensitive reports. The reporting process should be communicated during induction and reinforced through awareness activities.
controls.guidance: Establish a single reporting channel (phone, email, portal). Provide 24/7 reporting capability. Encourage reporting without fear of blame. Acknowledge receipt of all reports. Track report resolution times.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση έγκαιρης αναφοράς συμβάντων ασφάλειας πληροφοριών.
controls.description_el: Τα συμβάντα ασφάλειας πληροφοριών πρέπει να αναφέρονται έγκαιρα.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η αναφορά συμβάντων επιτρέπει την ταχεία αντιμετώπιση και τον περιορισμό ζημιών.
controls.guidance_el: Παρέχετε πολλαπλά κανάλια αναφοράς περιστατικών.

domains.name: Physical Controls
domains.description: Controls related to physical security of facilities, equipment and information assets.
domains.description_el: Έλεγχοι που σχετίζονται με τη φυσική ασφάλεια εγκαταστάσεων, εξοπλισμού και περιουσιακών στοιχείων πληροφοριών.

controls.title: Physical security perimeters
controls.purpose: To define and implement physical security boundaries.
controls.description: The organization shall define and implement physical security perimeters to protect information processing facilities.
controls.detailed_description: Physical security perimeters create a boundary between internal secure areas and the external environment. Perimeters may include walls, fences, gates, locked doors, and barriers. The level of physical security should be based on a risk assessment considering the sensitivity of assets, location, and threat environment. Multiple layers of physical security (defense in depth) provide better protection than single barriers.
controls.guidance: Conduct physical security risk assessments. Implement multiple layers of perimeter security. Use intrusion detection systems on perimeters. Control and monitor entry points. Test physical security controls regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία εγκαταστάσεων και πληροφοριών μέσω φυσικών περιμέτρων ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Οι εγκαταστάσεις και οι πληροφορίες πρέπει να προστατεύονται μέσω φυσικών περιμέτρων ασφάλειας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Τα φυσικά όρια ασφάλειας αποτρέπουν μη εξουσιοδοτημένη φυσική πρόσβαση.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε περιφράξεις, κλειδαριές και συστήματα ελέγχου εισόδου.

controls.title: Physical entry
controls.purpose: To secure physical entry to premises and rooms.
controls.description: The organization shall control physical access to premises and secure areas.
controls.detailed_description: Physical access controls ensure that only authorized individuals can enter organizational premises and secure areas. Access control systems may include card readers, biometric scanners, key systems, and security personnel. Access should be granted based on business need and reviewed regularly. Visitor access should be logged, accompanied, and time-limited.
controls.guidance: Use electronic access control systems with audit trails. Implement visitor management procedures. Conduct periodic access rights reviews. Escort visitors in secure areas. Revoke access promptly when no longer needed.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφαλούς φυσικής εισόδου σε χώρους του οργανισμού.
controls.description_el: Η ασφαλής φυσική είσοδος σε χώρους του οργανισμού πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο φυσικός έλεγχος εισόδου προστατεύει τις εγκαταστάσεις από μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε συστήματα ελέγχου εισόδου (καρτέλες, βιομετρικά).

controls.title: Securing offices, rooms and facilities
controls.purpose: To secure physical areas against unauthorized access.
controls.description: The organization shall secure offices, rooms and facilities against unauthorized physical access.
controls.detailed_description: Offices, server rooms, network closets, and other facilities require physical protection appropriate to the assets they contain. This includes lockable doors, secure windows, access control systems, and environmental monitoring. High-security areas may require additional controls such as mantraps, CCTV, and intrusion alarms. The level of security should be proportionate to the value and sensitivity of assets within.
controls.guidance: Lock server rooms and network closets at all times. Implement environmental monitoring (temperature, humidity). Use CCTV in critical areas. Maintain asset register for each room. Conduct physical security walkthroughs.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία χώρων από μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση και φυσικές απειλές.
controls.description_el: Οι χώροι πρέπει να προστατεύονται από μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση και φυσικές απειλές.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφάλεια γραφείων και εγκαταστάσεων προστατεύει ανθρώπους και περιουσιακά στοιχεία.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε διαβαθμισμένες ζώνες ασφάλειας ανάλογα με την ευαισθησία.

controls.title: Physical security monitoring
controls.purpose: To monitor physical areas for unauthorized access.
controls.description: The organization shall monitor physical areas for unauthorized physical access.
controls.detailed_description: Physical security monitoring provides detection of unauthorized access attempts and supports incident response. Monitoring technologies include CCTV systems, intrusion detection sensors, motion detectors, and alarm systems. Recorded footage should be retained for an appropriate period and protected from tampering. Monitoring should be documented in a physical security monitoring policy with defined response procedures.
controls.guidance: Install CCTV at entry points and critical areas. Retain footage for minimum 30 days. Test intrusion detection systems regularly. Establish monitoring response procedures. Protect monitoring recordings from tampering.
controls.purpose_el: Συνεχής παρακολούθηση των φυσικών μέτρων ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η συνεχής παρακολούθηση των φυσικών μέτρων ασφάλειας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η παρακολούθηση φυσικής ασφάλειας περιλαμβάνει κάμερες, συναγερμούς και περιπολίες.
controls.guidance_el: Καταγράψτε και αναλύστε συμβάντα φυσικής ασφάλειας.

controls.title: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
controls.purpose: To protect against natural disasters and environmental threats.
controls.description: The organization shall protect against physical and environmental threats such as natural disasters and intentional attacks.
controls.detailed_description: Physical and environmental threats include fire, flood, earthquake, extreme temperatures, power failures, and deliberate attacks. Protection measures should be based on a risk assessment considering the location, building construction, and criticality of assets. Controls may include fire suppression systems, UPS/generators, water detection, and structural reinforcement. Business continuity plans should address residual risks.
controls.guidance: Install fire suppression systems in critical areas. Implement UPS and backup generators. Use water detection sensors in server rooms. Conduct risk assessments for environmental threats. Include environmental scenarios in BCP testing.
controls.title_el: Προστασία από φυσικές και περιβαλλοντικές απειλές
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία εγκαταστάσεων από φυσικές και περιβαλλοντικές απειλές.
controls.description_el: Οι εγκαταστάσεις πρέπει να προστατεύονται από φυσικές και περιβαλλοντικές απειλές.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η προστασία περιλαμβάνει μέτρα για πυρκαγιά, πλημμύρα, σεισμό και άλλες φυσικές καταστροφές.
controls.guidance_el: Εγκαταστήστε συστήματα πυρόσβεσης και ανίχνευσης διαρροών.

controls.title: Working in secure areas
controls.purpose: To ensure security in designated secure areas.
controls.description: The organization shall apply security measures to protect personnel and assets in secure areas.
controls.detailed_description: Secure areas require additional controls beyond standard physical security. These may include restrictions on what can be brought in or taken out, prohibitions on photography, and limitations on unsupervised access. Personnel working in secure areas should be aware of specific security procedures. Secure areas include server rooms, data centers, research labs, and executive offices.
controls.guidance: Define rules for working in secure areas. Restrict personal devices in secure areas. Prohibit photography without authorization. Maintain access logs for secure areas. Train personnel on secure area procedures.
controls.purpose_el: Καθιέρωση κανόνων για εργασία σε περιοχές με αυξημένες απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Πρέπει να καθιερωθούν κανόνες για εργασία σε περιοχές με αυξημένες απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι περιοχές ασφάλειας απαιτούν πρόσθετους ελέγχους πρόσβασης και επιτήρηση.
controls.guidance_el: Καθορίστε ποιος επιτρέπεται σε περιοχές ασφάλειας και υπό ποιες συνθήκες.

controls.title: Clear desk and clear screen
controls.purpose: To reduce risk of unauthorized access to information.
controls.description: The organization shall implement clear desk and clear screen policies to reduce risk of unauthorized access.
controls.detailed_description: Clear desk and clear screen policies ensure that sensitive information is not left exposed when workstations are unattended. This includes locking screens, removing papers from desks, securing portable devices, and clearing printer output. The policy should cover all types of workspaces including offices, hot desks, and home offices. Compliance should be monitored through spot checks and security walkthroughs.
controls.guidance: Implement automatic screen lock after 5 minutes of inactivity. Provide secure storage for documents. Conduct clear desk spot checks. Include clear desk requirements in induction training. Use privacy screens for sensitive work.
controls.purpose_el: Μείωση κινδύνου μη εξουσιοδοτημένης πρόσβασης σε πληροφορίες σε χώρους εργασίας.
controls.description_el: Ο κίνδυνος μη εξουσιοδοτημένης πρόσβασης σε πληροφορίες σε χώρους εργασίας πρέπει να μειώνεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η πολιτική καθαρού γραφείου και οθόνης προστατεύει πληροφορίες από μη εξουσιοδοτημένη θέαση.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε αυτόματο κλείδωμα οθόνης και καθαρισμό γραφείων.

controls.title: Equipment siting and protection
controls.purpose: To protect equipment from physical threats.
controls.description: The organization shall site and protect equipment to reduce risks from environmental threats and unauthorized access.
controls.detailed_description: Equipment should be sited and protected to minimize risks from physical threats and unauthorized access. This includes considerations for server room location (avoid basements in flood-prone areas), equipment positioning (away from water pipes), and securing equipment against theft. Environmental controls (temperature, humidity, power quality) should be maintained according to equipment specifications.
controls.guidance: Site critical equipment in environmentally controlled rooms. Secure equipment with cable locks or enclosures. Maintain environmental monitoring. Keep equipment away from water sources. Use anti-static flooring in server rooms.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία εξοπλισμού από φυσικές απειλές και μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.description_el: Ο εξοπλισμός πρέπει να προστατεύεται από φυσικές απειλές και μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η σωστή τοποθέτηση και προστασία εξοπλισμού μειώνει κινδύνους ζημιάς και κλοπής.
controls.guidance_el: Τοποθετήστε εξοπλισμό σε ασφαλείς χώρους μακριά από κοινόχρηστους χώρους.

controls.title: Security of assets off-premises
controls.purpose: To protect assets when off organizational premises.
controls.description: The organization shall protect off-premises assets against the risks of physical theft, loss and environmental damage.
controls.detailed_description: Assets taken off organizational premises (laptops, mobile devices, documents, equipment) face increased risks. Controls should address physical protection, data security, and reporting of loss or theft. This includes requiring encryption on mobile devices, using secure transport for valuable equipment, and implementing tracking for high-value assets. Personnel should be trained on the risks of working off-premises.
