controls.guidance: Encrypt all laptops and mobile devices. Use asset tracking tags for valuable equipment. Train staff on off-premises security. Require immediate reporting of lost or stolen devices. Implement remote wipe capability.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία φορητών περιουσιακών στοιχείων εκτός των εγκαταστάσεων.
controls.description_el: Τα φορητά περιουσιακά στοιχεία πρέπει να προστατεύονται εκτός των εγκαταστάσεων.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο φορητός εξοπλισμός είναι ιδιαίτερα ευάλωτος σε κλοπή και απώλεια.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε κρυπτογράφηση συσκευών και πολιτική φορητών συσκευών.

controls.title: Storage media
controls.purpose: To manage storage media securely throughout lifecycle.
controls.description: The organization shall manage storage media securely throughout its lifecycle.
controls.detailed_description: Storage media (hard drives, SSDs, USB drives, tapes, optical media) require secure management from procurement through disposal. Controls should cover media classification, handling, transport, storage, and destruction. Media reuse must ensure complete data removal through secure wiping. Destruction methods should be appropriate to the classification of data previously stored on the media.
controls.guidance: Classify media based on data stored. Use secure wiping software before media reuse. Use degaussing or physical destruction for classified media. Maintain media disposal records. Track media movement through asset management.
controls.purpose_el: Ασφαλής αποθήκευση και διαχείριση φυσικών μέσων αποθήκευσης.
controls.description_el: Τα φυσικά μέσα αποθήκευσης πρέπει να αποθηκεύονται και να διαχειρίζονται με ασφάλεια.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφαλής αποθήκευση μέσων προστατεύει από ζημιά, κλοπή και μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε ερμάρια και ντουλάπες ασφαλείας για αποθήκευση μέσων.

controls.title: Supporting utilities
controls.purpose: To protect information assets from utility failures.
controls.description: The organization shall protect information processing facilities from power failures and other disruptions caused by utility failures.
controls.detailed_description: Supporting utilities (electricity, telecommunications, water, HVAC) are essential for information processing facilities. Failures can cause service disruption or equipment damage. Controls should include uninterruptible power supplies (UPS) to bridge short-term outages, backup generators for extended outages, and redundant utility feeds where available. Regular testing of backup utilities is essential.
controls.guidance: Install UPS for critical equipment. Test UPS and generators regularly. Arrange redundant power feeds where possible. Monitor utility quality (voltage, frequency). Document utility failure procedures.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία του εξοπλισμού από διακοπές βοηθητικών υπηρεσιών.
controls.description_el: Ο εξοπλισμός πρέπει να προστατεύεται από διακοπές βοηθητικών υπηρεσιών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι βοηθητικές υπηρεσίες όπως ηλεκτρισμός, ύδρευση και κλιματισμός είναι κρίσιμες για τη λειτουργία ΤΠ.
controls.guidance_el: Εγκαταστήστε UPS και γεννήτριες για κρίσιμο εξοπλισμό.

controls.title: Cabling security
controls.purpose: To protect cabling from interception or damage.
controls.description: The organization shall protect cabling carrying power, data and supporting services against interception, interference and damage.
controls.detailed_description: Cabling infrastructure is vulnerable to physical damage, electromagnetic interference, and interception. Power and data cables should be physically separated to reduce interference. Cabling should be routed through secure conduits and protected from accidental damage. Sensitive data cables should be protected from tapping through physical security and encryption. Labeling and documentation support maintenance and change management.
controls.guidance: Use shielded cabling for sensitive data. Separate power and data cables. Secure cable runs in conduits or cable trays. Label all cables clearly. Protect network ports in public areas.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία καλωδίωσης από υποκλοπή ή ζημιά.
controls.description_el: Η καλωδίωση πρέπει να προστατεύεται από υποκλοπή ή ζημιά.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η προστασία καλωδίωσης περιλαμβάνει φυσική προστασία και αποφυγή εκτεθειμένων καλωδίων.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε αγωγούς καλωδίων και κλειδωμένα πατάρια.

controls.title: Equipment maintenance
controls.purpose: To ensure equipment maintenance is performed securely.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure equipment is maintained correctly to ensure its continuing availability and integrity.
controls.detailed_description: Regular maintenance of equipment ensures reliable operation and extends equipment life. Maintenance should be performed according to manufacturer specifications and organizational requirements. Maintenance can be performed in-house or by external service providers, who should be subject to appropriate security controls. Records of all maintenance activities should be maintained for audit and planning purposes.
controls.guidance: Schedule preventive maintenance for critical equipment. Use authorized maintenance providers only. Supervise external maintenance personnel. Document all maintenance activities. Retain maintenance records for equipment lifecycle.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση σωστής συντήρησης του εξοπλισμού για συνεχή διαθεσιμότητα και ακεραιότητα.
controls.description_el: Η σωστή συντήρηση του εξοπλισμού για συνεχή διαθεσιμότητα και ακεραιότητα πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η προληπτική συντήρηση μειώνει τον κίνδυνο απρογραμμάτιστης διακοπής λειτουργίας.
controls.guidance_el: Τηρείτε πρόγραμμα προληπτικής συντήρησης για όλο τον κρίσιμο εξοπλισμό.

controls.title: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
controls.purpose: To ensure secure disposal or re-use of equipment.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure secure disposal or re-use of equipment containing storage media.
controls.detailed_description: Equipment disposal and re-use must ensure that all sensitive data is securely removed before equipment leaves organizational control. This applies to all equipment with data storage capability including computers, servers, printers, copiers, and mobile devices. Secure disposal methods include cryptographic erasure, degaussing, and physical destruction. A certificate of sanitization should be obtained for disposed equipment.
controls.guidance: Establish equipment disposal procedures. Use certified data destruction services. Obtain certificates of destruction. Sanitize equipment before transfer or sale. Maintain disposal records for audit.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφαλούς διάθεσης ή επαναχρησιμοποίησης εξοπλισμού.
controls.description_el: Η ασφαλής διάθεση ή επαναχρησιμοποίηση εξοπλισμού πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διάθεση εξοπλισμού πρέπει να περιλαμβάνει ασφαλή διαγραφή ή καταστροφή δεδομένων.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε πιστοποιημένες υπηρεσίες καταστροφής δεδομένων.

domains.name: Technological Controls
domains.description: Controls related to technical security measures for systems and networks.
domains.description_el: Έλεγχοι που σχετίζονται με τεχνικά μέτρα ασφάλειας για συστήματα και δίκτυα.

controls.title: User endpoint devices
controls.purpose: To secure user endpoint devices.
controls.description: The organization shall protect user endpoint devices used for information processing.
controls.detailed_description: End-user devices including laptops, desktops, tablets, and smartphones are common targets for attacks and a primary vector for data breaches. Controls should include device encryption, endpoint protection software, patch management, device management (MDM), and user authentication. Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) programs require additional controls including device separation and remote wipe capabilities.
controls.guidance: Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions. Enforce disk encryption on all devices. Implement mobile device management (MDM). Patch endpoints within defined SLAs. Restrict administrative privileges on endpoints.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία πληροφοριών που αποθηκεύονται ή επεξεργάζονται σε τερματικά συσκευών χρηστών.
controls.description_el: Οι πληροφορίες που αποθηκεύονται ή επεξεργάζονται σε τερματικά συσκευών χρηστών πρέπει να προστατεύονται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι συσκευές χρηστών είναι συχνά ο στόχος επιθέσεων και πρέπει να προστατεύονται κατάλληλα.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε πολιτική BYOD ή παρέχετε εταιρικές συσκευές.

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.purpose: To control and manage privileged access.
controls.description: The organization shall control and manage privileged access rights to systems and data.
controls.detailed_description: Privileged accounts (administrators, root users, service accounts) have elevated access that can bypass normal security controls. These accounts require additional protections including just-in-time (JIT) access, privileged access management (PAM) tools, multi-factor authentication, and session monitoring. Privileged access should be granted only when needed and for the minimum duration required. Regular reviews of privileged accounts are essential.
controls.guidance: Implement a PAM solution. Enforce MFA for all privileged access. Use JIT access for administrative tasks. Monitor and record privileged sessions. Review privileged access quarterly.
controls.purpose_el: Περιορισμός και διαχείριση των προνομίων πρόσβασης σε συστήματα και δεδομένα.
controls.description_el: Τα προνόμια πρόσβασης σε συστήματα και δεδομένα πρέπει να περιορίζονται και να διαχειρίζονται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Τα αυξημένα προνόμια πρόσβασης ενέχουν μεγαλύτερο κίνδυνο και απαιτούν πρόσθετους ελέγχους.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε αρχή ελάχιστων προνομίων για όλους τους χρήστες.

controls.title: Information access restriction
controls.purpose: To restrict access to information based on need-to-know.
controls.description: The organization shall restrict access to information based on established access control policies.
controls.detailed_description: Information access restriction ensures that users can only access the information they need for their roles (need-to-know principle). Access controls should be applied at multiple levels including network, application, database, and file system. Role-based access control (RBAC) and attribute-based access control (ABAC) models help manage access efficiently. Access rights should be subject to regular review.
controls.guidance: Define access policies by role and data classification. Implement least privilege principles. Use RBAC for consistent access management. Conduct quarterly access reviews. Implement automated access recertification.
controls.purpose_el: Περιορισμός πρόσβασης σε πληροφορίες και πόρους συστημάτων εφαρμογών.
controls.description_el: Η πρόσβαση σε πληροφορίες και πόρους συστημάτων εφαρμογών πρέπει να περιορίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο περιορισμός πρόσβασης σε πληροφορίες διασφαλίζει ότι μόνο εξουσιοδοτημένοι χρήστες βλέπουν δεδομένα.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε ελέγχους πρόσβασης βάσει ρόλων (RBAC).

controls.title: Access to source code
controls.purpose: To control access to source code.
controls.description: The organization shall control access to program source code and associated items.
controls.detailed_description: Source code is a valuable intellectual property asset and a potential security vulnerability if not properly controlled. Access to source code repositories, development environments, and build systems should be restricted based on role. Version control systems should enforce access controls and maintain audit trails. Code changes should require peer review. Third-party access to source code should be subject to specific agreements.
controls.guidance: Use version control with access controls. Require pull request reviews for all code changes. Restrict direct access to production code. Implement CI/CD pipeline security. Audit source code access regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Περιορισμός πρόσβασης σε πηγαίο κώδικα για προστασία της πνευματικής ιδιοκτησίας.
controls.description_el: Η πρόσβαση σε πηγαίο κώδικα πρέπει να περιορίζεται για προστασία της πνευματικής ιδιοκτησίας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο πηγαίος κώδικας είναι πολύτιμο περιουσιακό στοιχείο και πρέπει να προστατεύεται από μη εξουσιοδοτημένη πρόσβαση.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε συστήματα ελέγχου εκδόσεων με έλεγχο πρόσβασης.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.purpose: To implement secure authentication methods.
controls.description: The organization shall implement secure authentication methods for users and systems.
controls.detailed_description: Authentication verifies the identity of users, systems, and services before granting access. Secure authentication should use multiple factors where appropriate (something you know, have, and are). Password policies should require adequate complexity and length. Multi-factor authentication should be mandatory for privileged accounts and remote access. Biometric authentication should have appropriate liveness detection.
controls.guidance: Enforce MFA for all external-facing systems. Implement passwordless authentication where possible. Use FIDO2/WebAuthn standards. Secure biometric templates. Regularly review authentication logs.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφαλούς πιστοποίησης ταυτότητας μέσω κατάλληλων μηχανισμών.
controls.description_el: Η ασφαλής πιστοποίηση ταυτότητας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται μέσω κατάλληλων μηχανισμών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι μηχανισμοί πιστοποίησης πρέπει να είναι ανθεκτικοί σε επιθέσεις και να υποστηρίζουν πολυπαραγοντική πιστοποίηση.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε πολυπαραγοντική πιστοποίηση για κρίσιμα συστήματα.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.purpose: To ensure adequate capacity for information processing.
controls.description: The organization shall monitor and manage the capacity of information processing facilities.
controls.detailed_description: Capacity management ensures that information processing facilities have sufficient resources to meet current and future business requirements. This includes monitoring CPU, memory, storage, and network utilization, forecasting future demand, and planning capacity upgrades. Insufficient capacity can lead to service degradation or outages. Capacity planning should consider both normal operations and peak demands.
controls.guidance: Monitor resource utilization with thresholds and alerts. Forecast capacity needs based on growth trends. Plan capacity upgrades with sufficient lead time. Document capacity management procedures. Review capacity during change management.
controls.purpose_el: Παρακολούθηση και προσαρμογή της δυναμικότητας συστημάτων για διασφάλιση διαθεσιμότητας.
controls.description_el: Η δυναμικότητα συστημάτων πρέπει να παρακολουθείται και να προσαρμόζεται για διασφάλιση διαθεσιμότητας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαχείριση δυναμικότητας προβλέπει μελλοντικές ανάγκες και αποτρέπει υπερφόρτωση συστημάτων.
controls.guidance_el: Παρακολουθήστε χρήση πόρων και προγραμματίστε επεκτάσεις.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.purpose: To protect against malware through technical controls.
controls.description: The organization shall implement protection against malware through preventive and detective controls.
controls.detailed_description: Malware protection requires a multi-layered approach including antivirus/antimalware software, endpoint detection and response (EDR), email filtering, web filtering, and user awareness. Signature-based detection should be supplemented with behavioral analysis and threat intelligence. All systems should be protected, including servers, endpoints, mobile devices, and virtual environments. Malware protection software should be kept current with automatic updates.
controls.guidance: Deploy EDR on all endpoints. Use email and web filtering gateways. Keep malware signatures updated. Conduct regular malware scan schedules. Train users on malware prevention.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία συστημάτων από κακόβουλο λογισμικό.
controls.description_el: Τα συστήματα πρέπει να προστατεύονται από κακόβουλο λογισμικό.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η προστασία από κακόβουλο λογισμικό περιλαμβάνει προληπτικά και ανιχνευτικά μέτρα.
controls.guidance_el: Εγκαταστήστε λογισμικό προστασίας από κακόβουλο λογισμικό σε όλα τα συστήματα.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.purpose: To manage technical vulnerabilities effectively.
controls.description: The organization shall manage technical vulnerabilities in a timely manner.
controls.detailed_description: Technical vulnerability management is a continuous process of identifying, evaluating, prioritizing, and remediating security vulnerabilities in systems and software. The process should cover operating systems, applications, network devices, and firmware. Vulnerability scanning should be conducted regularly, and critical vulnerabilities should be patched within defined timeframes. A vulnerability management policy should define SLAs for remediation based on severity.
controls.guidance: Conduct regular vulnerability scans (weekly/monthly). Prioritize vulnerabilities by CVSS score and context. Patch critical vulnerabilities within 48 hours. Use a patch management system. Test patches before production deployment.
controls.purpose_el: Πρόληψη εκμετάλλευσης τεχνικών τρωτών σημείων μέσω συστηματικής διαχείρισης.
controls.description_el: Η εκμετάλλευση τεχνικών τρωτών σημείων πρέπει να αποτρέπεται μέσω συστηματικής διαχείρισης.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαχείριση τρωτών σημείων περιλαμβάνει τακτική σάρωση, αξιολόγηση και επιδιόρθωση.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε τακτικές σαρώσεις τρωτών σημείων και εφαρμόστε ενημερώσεις.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.purpose: To manage system configurations securely.
controls.description: The organization shall establish and maintain secure configurations for hardware, software and services.
controls.detailed_description: Configuration management ensures that systems are deployed and maintained in a known secure state. This includes establishing security baseline configurations, using automated configuration management tools, monitoring for configuration drift, and applying hardening standards (e.g., CIS benchmarks). Configuration changes should follow a change management process. Non-compliant configurations should be detected and remediated automatically.
controls.guidance: Use CIS benchmarks for system hardening. Implement infrastructure as code (IaC) for consistent deployments. Automate configuration compliance monitoring. Track configuration changes through CMDB. Remediate configuration drift automatically.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφαλούς ρύθμισης παραμέτρων συστημάτων και εφαρμογών.
controls.description_el: Η ασφαλής ρύθμιση παραμέτρων συστημάτων και εφαρμογών πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαχείριση ρυθμίσεων παραμέτρων αποτρέπει εσφαλμένες ρυθμίσεις που εκθέτουν τον οργανισμό σε κίνδυνο.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε πρότυπα ασφαλούς ρύθμισης για όλα τα συστήματα.

controls.title: Information deletion
controls.purpose: To ensure secure deletion of information when no longer needed.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure secure deletion of information when no longer needed.
controls.detailed_description: Information deletion ensures that data is permanently and irrecoverably removed when it is no longer required for business or legal purposes. Deletion should follow retention schedules defined in records management policies. Different deletion methods are required for different storage media (overwriting, cryptographic erasure, degaussing, physical destruction). Deletion should be verified and logged. Deletion processes must ensure data is removed from all locations including backups.
controls.guidance: Define retention periods for all data types. Use secure deletion methods appropriate to media. Verify deletion through verification procedures. Log all deletion activities. Ensure backups also comply with retention schedules.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφαλούς διαγραφής πληροφοριών όταν δεν απαιτούνται πλέον.
controls.description_el: Η ασφαλής διαγραφή πληροφοριών πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται όταν δεν απαιτούνται πλέον.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφαλής διαγραφή αποτρέπει ανάκτηση ευαίσθητων πληροφοριών από μη εξουσιοδοτημένα άτομα.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε εργαλεία ασφαλούς διαγραφής που πληρούν πρότυπα.

controls.title: Data masking
controls.purpose: To mask data according to organizational policy.
controls.description: The organization shall use data masking techniques to protect sensitive data as required.
controls.detailed_description: Data masking (also called data obfuscation or anonymization) replaces sensitive data with realistic but non-sensitive data for use in non-production environments. Techniques include substitution, shuffling, encryption, and tokenization. Masking should be irreversible or use strong encryption with separate key management. Testing environments, development, training, and analytics should use masked data where production data is not required.
controls.guidance: Identify data requiring masking. Implement masking in non-production environments. Use tokenization for payment data. Test that masked data remains usable. Audit masking implementation regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Απόκρυψη ευαίσθητων δεδομένων για προστασία από μη εξουσιοδοτημένη αποκάλυψη.
controls.description_el: Τα ευαίσθητα δεδομένα πρέπει να αποκρύπτονται για προστασία από μη εξουσιοδοτημένη αποκάλυψη.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η απόκρυψη δεδομένων περιλαμβάνει τεχνικές όπως συσκότιση, ανωνυμοποίηση και ψευδωνυμοποίηση.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε απόκρυψη δεδομένων σε μη παραγωγικά περιβάλλοντα.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.purpose: To prevent unauthorized disclosure of data.
controls.description: The organization shall implement data leakage prevention measures to detect and prevent unauthorized disclosure.
controls.detailed_description: Data leakage prevention (DLP) controls monitor, detect, and block unauthorized attempts to transfer sensitive data outside the organization. DLP solutions can operate at the network level (monitoring outbound traffic), endpoint level (monitoring USB, printing, clipboard), and cloud level (monitoring SaaS applications). DLP policies should be based on data classification and defined with input from business units to avoid false positives.
controls.guidance: Classify data to inform DLP rules. Start with monitoring mode before blocking. Implement network DLP for outbound traffic. Use endpoint DLP for removable media. Review DLP alerts regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Πρόληψη μη εξουσιοδοτημένης διαρροής δεδομένων.
controls.description_el: Η μη εξουσιοδοτημένη διαρροή δεδομένων πρέπει να αποτρέπεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η πρόληψη διαρροής δεδομένων (DLP) περιλαμβάνει παρακολούθηση και αποτροπή μη εξουσιοδοτημένης μεταφοράς δεδομένων.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε λύσεις DLP για παρακολούθηση εξερχόμενης κίνησης.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.purpose: To maintain availability through regular backups.
controls.description: The organization shall maintain and test backup copies of information, software and system images.
controls.detailed_description: Backups are essential for recovery from data loss events including system failures, ransomware attacks, accidental deletion, and natural disasters. The backup strategy should be defined by recovery point objectives (RPOs) and recovery time objectives (RTOs) established through business impact analysis. Backups should be encrypted, stored separately from production systems, and tested regularly. The 3-2-1 backup rule (3 copies, 2 media types, 1 offsite) is a recommended practice.
controls.guidance: Implement the 3-2-1 backup strategy. Encrypt backups at rest and in transit. Test backup restoration at least quarterly. Store backups offsite or in cloud. Protect backup systems from ransomware.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση διαθεσιμότητας πληροφοριών μέσω αντιγράφων ασφαλείας.
controls.description_el: Η διαθεσιμότητα πληροφοριών πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται μέσω αντιγράφων ασφαλείας.
controls.detailed_description_el: Τα αντίγραφα ασφαλείας προστατεύουν από απώλεια δεδομένων λόγω βλάβης, καταστροφής ή επίθεσης.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε κανόνα 3-2-1 για αντίγραφα ασφαλείας.

controls.title: Redundancy of information processing facilities
controls.purpose: To ensure redundancy for business continuity.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure redundancy of information processing facilities to meet availability requirements.
controls.detailed_description: Redundancy ensures that information processing facilities remain available if individual components fail. This can include redundant servers (clustering), redundant network paths, redundant storage (RAID), and redundant data centers (active-active or active-passive). The level of redundancy should be based on availability requirements determined through business impact analysis. Redundant components should be tested regularly to ensure they function when needed.
controls.guidance: Design systems for high availability. Implement failover testing regularly. Use load balancers for traffic distribution. Ensure redundancy at all layers (compute, network, storage). Document failover procedures.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση διαθεσιμότητας εγκαταστάσεων επεξεργασίας πληροφοριών μέσω πλεονασμού.
controls.description_el: Η διαθεσιμότητα εγκαταστάσεων επεξεργασίας πληροφοριών πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται μέσω πλεονασμού.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο πλεονασμός εξασφαλίζει συνέχεια λειτουργίας σε περίπτωση βλάβης ή διακοπής.
controls.guidance_el: Σχεδιάστε συστήματα με πλεονασμό για κρίσιμες λειτουργίες.

controls.title: Logging
controls.purpose: To record events for audit and investigation purposes.
controls.description: The organization shall record events that provide evidence of system activity for security monitoring and investigation.
controls.detailed_description: Logging is essential for detecting security incidents, supporting investigations, and demonstrating compliance. Logs should record user activities, system events, authentication attempts, access to sensitive data, and administrative actions. Logs must be protected from tampering and retained for an appropriate period. A centralized logging solution (SIEM) enables correlation and analysis of logs from multiple sources.
controls.guidance: Implement centralized logging with SIEM. Log all authentication and authorization events. Protect logs from modification. Define log retention periods by regulation. Monitor logs for suspicious activity.
controls.title_el: Ασφάλεια ΤΠ σε συμφωνίες επιπέδου υπηρεσιών
controls.purpose_el: Ενσωμάτωση απαιτήσεων ασφάλειας σε συμφωνίες επιπέδου υπηρεσιών ΤΠ.
controls.description_el: Απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας πρέπει να ενσωματώνονται σε συμφωνίες επιπέδου υπηρεσιών ΤΠ.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι SLA πρέπει να καθορίζουν απαιτήσεις διαθεσιμότητας, απόδοσης και ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε μετρήσιμους δείκτες απόδοσης ασφάλειας σε SLA.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.purpose: To monitor systems for anomalous behavior.
controls.description: The organization shall monitor systems and networks for anomalous behavior and potential security incidents.
controls.detailed_description: Security monitoring provides continuous visibility into the security state of systems and networks. Monitoring should cover network traffic, system behavior, user activity, and security control effectiveness. Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) systems and User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) tools can help detect anomalies. Monitoring results should be reviewed regularly, and alerts should be investigated and escalated according to defined procedures.
controls.guidance: Deploy SIEM for centralized monitoring. Define use cases for alert generation. Establish monitoring coverage for all critical systems. Tune alerts to reduce false positives. Review monitoring reports weekly.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση συνεπούς και αποτελεσματικής διαχείρισης περιστατικών ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η συνεπής και αποτελεσματική διαχείριση περιστατικών ασφάλειας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαχείριση περιστατικών περιλαμβάνει ανίχνευση, αναφορά, αξιολόγηση, αντιμετώπιση και μάθηση.
controls.guidance_el: Καθιερώστε διαδικασία διαχείρισης περιστατικών βάσει προτύπου.

controls.title: Clock synchronization
controls.purpose: To synchronize system clocks for accurate logging.
controls.description: The organization shall synchronize system clocks to a single reference time source.
controls.detailed_description: Clock synchronization ensures that log timestamps are consistent across all systems, which is critical for correlating events during incident investigation and meeting legal admissibility requirements for evidence. The organization should use Network Time Protocol (NTP) to synchronize clocks to a reliable time source (e.g., national time standard or GPS-based source). Time zone settings should be consistent or clearly documented.
controls.guidance: Configure all systems to use NTP. Use authenticated NTP to prevent tampering. Document time zone settings. Monitor clock drift and synchronization status. Include time sync in system build standards.
controls.purpose_el: Παρακολούθηση συστημάτων και δικτύων για ανίχνευση περιστατικών ασφάλειας.
controls.description_el: Η παρακολούθηση συστημάτων και δικτύων για ανίχνευση περιστατικών ασφάλειας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι υπηρεσίες παρακολούθησης ασφάλειας παρέχουν έγκαιρη ανίχνευση και ειδοποίηση.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε SIEM για κεντρική παρακολούθηση ασφάλειας.

controls.title: Use of privileged utility programs
controls.purpose: To control the use of privileged utilities.
controls.description: The organization shall control the use of privileged utility programs that could bypass system controls.
controls.detailed_description: Privileged utilities (e.g., debuggers, system administration tools, registry editors) can bypass normal system and application controls if misused. Access to these utilities should be restricted to authorized personnel and logged. Usage should be monitored for suspicious activity. Alternative approaches (e.g., automated administration scripts) should be used where possible to reduce the need for direct utility access.
controls.guidance: Restrict utility access to authorized administrators. Log all usage of privileged utilities. Monitor utility usage for anomalies. Use automated administration tools where possible. Review utility access lists regularly.
controls.purpose_el: Περιορισμός της χρήσης προγραμμάτων με δικαιώματα διαχειριστή συστήματος.
controls.description_el: Η χρήση προγραμμάτων με δικαιώματα διαχειριστή συστήματος πρέπει να περιορίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η άρνηση πρόσβασης σε προνόμια αποτρέπει μη εξουσιοδοτημένες ενέργειες διαχειριστή.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε λύσεις PAM για διαχείριση προνομιακών λογαριασμών.

controls.title: Installation of software on operational systems
controls.purpose: To control software installation on operational systems.
controls.description: The organization shall control the installation of software on operational systems.
controls.detailed_description: Uncontrolled software installation can introduce vulnerabilities, malware, and configuration issues. Software installation should follow a formal process including approval, testing, and verification. Application whitelisting can prevent unauthorized software from running. Operating system and application installations should use standard builds and approved sources. Users should not have administrative rights to install software on managed systems.
controls.guidance: Use application whitelisting for critical systems. Remove local admin rights from users. Test software in staging before production. Use managed software distribution tools. Maintain a software inventory.
controls.purpose_el: Διαχείριση και έλεγχος εγκατάστασης λογισμικού σε λειτουργικά συστήματα.
controls.description_el: Η εγκατάσταση λογισμικού σε λειτουργικά συστήματα πρέπει να διαχειρίζεται και να ελέγχεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο έλεγχος εγκατάστασης λογισμικού αποτρέπει μη εξουσιοδοτημένο λογισμικό και κακόβουλο κώδικα.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε λίστες επιτρεπόμενων εφαρμογών.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.purpose: To secure networks and network services.
controls.description: The organization shall secure networks and network services to protect information and systems.
controls.detailed_description: Network security protects the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data in transit and the systems connected to the network. Controls should include network segmentation, firewalls, intrusion detection/prevention systems (IDS/IPS), and network access control (NAC). Networks should be segregated based on security requirements (e.g., separating production from development, internal from DMZ, guest Wi-Fi from corporate network).
controls.guidance: Implement network segmentation by security zone. Use firewalls to control inter-zone traffic. Deploy IDS/IPS for threat detection. Implement 802.1X for network access control. Monitor network traffic for anomalies.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία δικτύων από απειλές και διασφάλιση ασφάλειας συστημάτων που χρησιμοποιούν δίκτυα.
controls.description_el: Τα δίκτυα πρέπει να προστατεύονται από απειλές και η ασφάλεια συστημάτων που χρησιμοποιούν δίκτυα να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφάλεια δικτύων περιλαμβάνει τείχη προστασίας, τμηματοποίηση και παρακολούθηση.
controls.guidance_el: Τμηματοποιήστε το δίκτυο σε ζώνες ασφάλειας.

controls.title: Security of network services
controls.purpose: To define security requirements for network services.
controls.description: The organization shall define and implement security requirements for network services.
controls.detailed_description: Network services (DNS, DHCP, VPN, proxies, load balancers) must be configured securely to support overall network security. Each network service should have documented security requirements covering access control, logging, redundancy, and encryption. Service level agreements for network services should include security metrics. Changes to network services should follow the change management process.
controls.guidance: Document security requirements for each network service. Implement access controls for network management. Encrypt administrative access to network devices. Log all network service changes. Review network service security quarterly.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφάλειας υπηρεσιών δικτύου μέσω κατάλληλων μηχανισμών.
controls.description_el: Η ασφάλεια υπηρεσιών δικτύου πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται μέσω κατάλληλων μηχανισμών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι υπηρεσίες δικτύου πρέπει να είναι ασφαλώς ρυθμισμένες και παρακολουθούμενες.
controls.guidance_el: Απενεργοποιήστε μη χρησιμοποιούμενες υπηρεσίες δικτύου.

controls.title: Segregation of networks
controls.purpose: To segregate networks for different security levels.
controls.description: The organization shall segregate networks based on security requirements.
controls.detailed_description: Network segregation divides the network into separate zones based on security classification, function, or risk level. Segregation can be achieved through physical separation (separate network hardware) or logical separation (VLANs, firewalls). Segregation limits the impact of a security breach by containing it within a single network zone. Guest networks, DMZs, and IoT networks should be segregated from corporate networks.
controls.guidance: Design network zones based on data classification. Use VLANs for logical segregation. Implement firewall rules between zones. Separate guest Wi-Fi from corporate network. Audit network segregation quarterly.
controls.purpose_el: Διαχωρισμός ομάδων υπηρεσιών πληροφορικής, χρηστών και συστημάτων σε δίκτυα.
controls.description_el: Ομάδες υπηρεσιών πληροφορικής, χρηστών και συστημάτων πρέπει να διαχωρίζονται σε δίκτυα.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο διαχωρισμός δικτύων περιορίζει την πλευρική κίνηση σε περίπτωση παραβίασης.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε VLAN και τείχη προστασίας για διαχωρισμό δικτύων.

controls.title: Web filtering
controls.purpose: To protect systems from web-based threats.
controls.description: The organization shall implement web filtering to protect systems from web-based threats.
controls.detailed_description: Web filtering controls access to internet websites to protect against malware, phishing, and inappropriate content. Filters can block known malicious sites, enforce acceptable use policies, and prevent data leakage. Web filtering should be applied to all users and devices accessing the internet through organizational networks. Categories, whitelists, and blacklists should be maintained based on organizational policy.
controls.guidance: Implement web proxy with content filtering. Block known malicious and phishing sites. Filter by category based on policy. Allow exceptions through defined approval process. Monitor web traffic for violations.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία συστημάτων από κακόβουλο περιεχόμενο και περιορισμός πρόσβασης σε μη εγκεκριμένους ιστότοπους.
controls.description_el: Η πρόσβαση σε μη εγκεκριμένους ιστότοπους πρέπει να περιορίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Το φιλτράρισμα ιστού προστατεύει από κακόβουλο περιεχόμενο και μη παραγωγική πλοήγηση.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε λύση φιλτραρίσματος ιστού με κατηγοριοποίηση περιεχομένου.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.purpose: To ensure proper use of cryptography for information protection.
controls.description: The organization shall ensure proper and effective use of cryptography to protect information.
controls.detailed_description: Cryptography provides confidentiality, integrity, authentication, and non-repudiation for information. A cryptographic policy should define approved algorithms, key lengths, key management procedures, and use cases. Cryptographic keys must be protected throughout their lifecycle using a hardware security module (HSM) or key management service where appropriate. Cryptographic controls should comply with relevant regulations and standards.
controls.guidance: Develop a cryptographic policy. Use approved algorithms (AES-256, RSA-2048+). Implement key management procedures. Use TLS 1.2+ for data in transit. Consider quantum-resistant algorithms for long-lived data.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση αποτελεσματικής χρήσης κρυπτογραφίας για προστασία της εμπιστευτικότητας και ακεραιότητας.
controls.description_el: Η αποτελεσματική χρήση κρυπτογραφίας για προστασία της εμπιστευτικότητας και ακεραιότητας πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η κρυπτογραφία προστατεύει δεδομένα σε ηρεμία, σε κίνηση και σε χρήση.
controls.guidance_el: Καθορίστε πολιτική κρυπτογράφησης και διαχείρισης κλειδιών.

controls.title: Secure development lifecycle
controls.purpose: To integrate security into the development lifecycle.
controls.description: The organization shall establish and maintain a secure development lifecycle for software and systems.
controls.detailed_description: A secure development lifecycle (SDL or SSDLC) integrates security into every phase of the software development process from requirements through design, implementation, testing, deployment, and maintenance. Key activities include security requirements definition, threat modeling, secure coding standards, static and dynamic analysis, vulnerability scanning, and security testing before release. The process should be tailored to the development methodology (Agile, DevOps, Waterfall).
controls.guidance: Integrate security into each SDLC phase. Conduct threat modeling for new features. Perform SAST and DAST scanning. Define security acceptance criteria. Train developers on secure coding.
controls.purpose_el: Ενσωμάτωση ασφάλειας σε όλο τον κύκλο ζωής ανάπτυξης λογισμικού.
controls.description_el: Η ασφάλεια πρέπει να ενσωματώνεται σε όλο τον κύκλο ζωής ανάπτυξης λογισμικού.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο ασφαλής κύκλος ζωής ανάπτυξης (SSDLC) ενσωματώνει ασφάλεια σε κάθε φάση.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε μεθοδολογία DevSecOps για συνεχή ασφάλεια.

controls.title: Application security requirements
controls.purpose: To define security requirements for applications.
controls.description: The organization shall identify and document security requirements for applications.
controls.detailed_description: Application security requirements should be identified during the requirements phase of development or procurement. Requirements should address authentication, authorization, input validation, session management, cryptography, error handling, logging, and data protection. Security requirements should be derived from applicable regulations, organizational policies, and risk assessments. Acceptance testing should validate that security requirements are met.
controls.guidance: Document security requirements in specifications. Use security requirement checklists. Validate requirements against OWASP ASVS. Include security in acceptance criteria. Review requirements with security team.
controls.purpose_el: Καθορισμός και εφαρμογή απαιτήσεων ασφάλειας σε εφαρμογές.
controls.description_el: Απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας πρέπει να καθορίζονται και να εφαρμόζονται σε εφαρμογές.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας εφαρμογών πρέπει να καθορίζονται πριν από την ανάπτυξη.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας σε προδιαγραφές εφαρμογών.

controls.title: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
controls.purpose: To apply secure architecture principles.
controls.description: The organization shall apply secure system architecture and engineering principles to information systems.
controls.detailed_description: Secure architecture principles should be applied throughout the design of information systems. Principles include defense in depth, least privilege, secure defaults, fail secure, economy of mechanism, and complete mediation. Architecture reviews should assess security design and identify potential vulnerabilities. Reference architectures and design patterns should incorporate security by default.
controls.guidance: Apply security architecture principles (defense in depth, least privilege). Conduct architecture security reviews. Use reference security architectures. Document security design decisions. Review architecture against threats.
controls.purpose_el: Ενσωμάτωση αρχών ασφαλούς αρχιτεκτονικής στο σχεδιασμό συστημάτων.
controls.description_el: Αρχές ασφαλούς αρχιτεκτονικής πρέπει να ενσωματώνονται στο σχεδιασμό συστημάτων.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφαλής αρχιτεκτονική διασφαλίζει ότι η ασφάλεια είναι θεμελιώδες χαρακτηριστικό του συστήματος.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε αρχή αμυντικής σε βάθος στο σχεδιασμό συστημάτων.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.purpose: To implement secure coding practices.
controls.description: The organization shall implement secure coding practices throughout the development process.
controls.detailed_description: Secure coding practices prevent common vulnerabilities such as injection flaws, cross-site scripting, buffer overflows, and insecure deserialization. Coding standards should reference recognized frameworks such as OWASP Top 10, CWE Top 25, and language-specific secure coding guidelines. Static analysis tools should be integrated into the development pipeline to automatically detect insecure code. Peer reviews should verify secure coding compliance.
controls.guidance: Adopt OWASP secure coding guidelines. Integrate SAST in CI/CD pipeline. Conduct peer code reviews with security focus. Train developers on secure coding annually. Maintain coding standards documentation.
controls.purpose_el: Εφαρμογή αρχών ασφαλούς κωδικοποίησης για μείωση τρωτών σημείων.
controls.description_el: Αρχές ασφαλούς κωδικοποίησης πρέπει να εφαρμόζονται για μείωση τρωτών σημείων.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ασφαλής κωδικοποίηση αποτρέπει κοινά τρωτά σημεία όπως SQL injection και XSS.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε λίστες ελέγχου ασφαλούς κωδικοποίησης και εργαλεία ανάλυσης.

controls.title: Security testing in development and acceptance
controls.purpose: To test security during development and acceptance.
controls.description: The organization shall conduct security testing during development and acceptance phases.
controls.detailed_description: Security testing ensures that applications meet security requirements before deployment. Testing should include static application security testing (SAST), dynamic application security testing (DAST), software composition analysis (SCA) for third-party components, and manual penetration testing for high-risk applications. Testing should occur at multiple points in the development lifecycle, not just at the end. Vulnerabilities should be tracked and remediated before go-live.
controls.guidance: Perform SAST/DAST in CI/CD pipeline. Run SCA for open-source components. Conduct penetration testing for critical apps. Track vulnerabilities to remediation. Test security controls in staging environment.
controls.title_el: Δοκιμές ασφάλειας στην ανάπτυξη και αποδοχή
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση δοκιμών ασφάλειας κατά την ανάπτυξη και αποδοχή συστημάτων.
controls.description_el: Δοκιμές ασφάλειας πρέπει να διεξάγονται κατά την ανάπτυξη και αποδοχή συστημάτων.
controls.detailed_description_el: Οι δοκιμές ασφάλειας περιλαμβάνουν δοκιμές διείσδυσης, σάρωση τρωτών σημείων και ανασκόπηση κώδικα.
controls.guidance_el: Διεξάγετε δοκιμές διείσδυσης πριν από την παραγωγή.

controls.title: Outsourced development
controls.purpose: To manage security of outsourced development.
controls.description: The organization shall manage security of outsourced development activities.
controls.detailed_description: Outsourced development introduces additional risks including intellectual property protection, code quality, and backdoors. The organization should specify security requirements in outsourcing contracts, require secure development practices, and conduct security testing of delivered software. Source code escrow may be appropriate for critical systems. Acceptance testing should include security verification.
controls.guidance: Include security requirements in outsourcing contracts. Require security testing by the developer. Conduct independent security reviews. Use source code escrow for critical systems. Verify security in acceptance testing.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ασφάλειας σε αναθέσεις ανάπτυξης σε εξωτερικούς συνεργάτες.
controls.description_el: Η ασφάλεια πρέπει να διασφαλίζεται σε αναθέσεις ανάπτυξης σε εξωτερικούς συνεργάτες.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η ανάθεση ανάπτυξης σε εξωτερικούς συνεργάτες απαιτεί συμβατικές ρήτρες ασφάλειας.
controls.guidance_el: Συμπεριλάβετε απαιτήσεις ασφάλειας σε συμβάσεις ανάπτυξης.

controls.title: Separation of development, test and production environments
controls.purpose: To separate development, test and production environments.
controls.description: The organization shall separate development, test and production environments.
controls.detailed_description: Separation of environments prevents unauthorized changes, protects production data, and supports quality assurance. Development, test, and production environments should be physically or logically separated with strict controls on promotions between environments. Production data should not be used in non-production environments without appropriate sanitization. Access to each environment should be restricted based on role.
controls.guidance: Use separate networks or VLANs for each environment. Control environment promotion processes. Sanitize data used in non-production. Restrict production access to operations staff. Audit environment separation regularly.
controls.title_el: Διαχωρισμός περιβαλλόντων ανάπτυξης, δοκιμών και παραγωγής
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία περιβάλλοντος παραγωγής μέσω διαχωρισμού από περιβάλλοντα ανάπτυξης και δοκιμών.
controls.description_el: Το περιβάλλον παραγωγής πρέπει να προστατεύεται μέσω διαχωρισμού από περιβάλλοντα ανάπτυξης και δοκιμών.
controls.detailed_description_el: Ο διαχωρισμός περιβαλλόντων αποτρέπει μη εξουσιοδοτημένες αλλαγές και διαρροές δεδομένων.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε ξεχωριστά περιβάλλοντα με διαφορετικά διαπιστευτήρια.

controls.title: Change management
controls.purpose: To manage changes securely.
controls.description: The organization shall manage changes to information processing facilities and systems in a controlled manner.
controls.detailed_description: Change management ensures that changes to systems and facilities are assessed, approved, tested, implemented, and reviewed in a controlled manner. Changes should be classified by risk level, with higher-risk changes requiring more rigorous review. Emergency changes should follow an expedited process but still require post-change review. A change advisory board (CAB) should review significant changes. All changes should be documented in a change log.
controls.guidance: Implement a formal change management process. Establish a Change Advisory Board (CAB). Classify changes by risk and impact. Test changes before production deployment. Document and review all changes.
controls.purpose_el: Διασφάλιση ελέγχου αλλαγών για μείωση επιπτώσεων στην ασφάλεια.
controls.description_el: Οι αλλαγές πρέπει να ελέγχονται για μείωση επιπτώσεων στην ασφάλεια.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η διαχείριση αλλαγών διασφαλίζει ότι όλες οι αλλαγές αξιολογούνται, εγκρίνονται και τεκμηριώνονται.
controls.guidance_el: Εφαρμόστε συμβουλευτική επιτροπή αλλαγών (CAB).

controls.title: Test information
controls.purpose: To protect test data appropriately.
controls.description: The organization shall protect test data appropriately.
controls.detailed_description: Test data should be carefully managed to avoid using production data containing sensitive or personal information in test environments. Where production data is needed for realistic testing, it should be sanitized, anonymized, or masked. Test data sets should be controlled, documented, and securely deleted when no longer needed. Access to test data should be restricted to authorized testing personnel.
controls.guidance: Use synthetic or anonymized data for testing. Mask production data used in test environments. Protect test data with access controls. Delete test data after testing completes. Document test data sources and handling.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία δεδομένων δοκιμών μέσω κατάλληλων ελέγχων.
controls.description_el: Τα δεδομένα δοκιμών πρέπει να προστατεύονται μέσω κατάλληλων ελέγχων.
controls.detailed_description_el: Η χρήση πραγματικών δεδομένων σε δοκιμές μπορεί να εκθέσει ευαίσθητες πληροφορίες.
controls.guidance_el: Χρησιμοποιήστε συνθετικά ή ανωνυμοποιημένα δεδομένα για δοκιμές.

controls.title: Protection of information systems during audit testing
controls.purpose: To protect systems during audit testing.
controls.description: The organization shall protect information systems during audit testing.
controls.detailed_description: Audit testing (including penetration testing and vulnerability assessments) can disrupt systems or expose sensitive information if not properly managed. Testing should be planned, scoped, and authorized in advance. System owners should be notified, and a test plan should define what systems are in scope, what tests will be performed, and what safeguards are in place. Testing should be conducted during agreed windows, and system backups should be verified before testing.
controls.guidance: Define audit testing scope and authorization. Notify system owners before testing. Use test accounts and systems where possible. Monitor systems during testing. Document testing results and remediation.
controls.purpose_el: Προστασία συστημάτων ελέγχου και παρακολούθησης από κυβερνοεπιθέσεις.
controls.description_el: Τα συστήματα ελέγχου και παρακολούθησης πρέπει να προστατεύονται από κυβερνοεπιθέσεις.
controls.detailed_description_el: Τα συστήματα βιομηχανικού ελέγχου (ICS/SCADA) απαιτούν ειδικά μέτρα προστασίας.
controls.guidance_el: Απομονώστε συστήματα ελέγχου από επιχειρηματικά δίκτυα.
